title: Towards a Theory of Faithfulness: Faithful Explanations of Differentiable Classifiers over Continuous Data
title_zh: 走向忠实理论：连续数据上可微分分类器的忠实解释
abstract: There is broad agreement in the literature that explanation methods should be faithful to the model that they explain, but faithfulness remains a rather vague term. We revisit faithfulness in the context of continuous data and propose two formal definitions of faithfulness for feature attribution methods. Qualitative faithfulness demands that scores reflect the true qualitative effect (positive vs. negative) of the feature on the model and quanitative faithfulness that the magnitude of scores reflect the true quantitative effect. We discuss under which conditions these requirements can be satisfied to which extent (local vs global). As an application of the conceptual idea, we look at differentiable classifiers over continuous data and characterize Gradient-scores as follows: every qualitatively faithful feature attribution method is qualitatively equivalent to Gradient-scores. Furthermore, if an attribution method is quantitatively faithful in the sense that changes of the output of the classifier are proportional to the scores of features, then it is either equivalent to gradient-scoring or it is based on an inferior approximation of the classifier. To illustrate the practical relevance of the theory, we experimentally demonstrate that popular attribution methods can fail to give faithful explanations in the setting where the data is continuous and the classifier differentiable.
summary: There is broad agreement in the literature that explanation methods should be faithful to the model that they explain, but faithfulness remains a rather vague term. We revisit faithfulness in the context of continuous data and propose two formal definitions of faithfulness for feature attribution methods. Qualitative faithfulness demands that scores reflect the true qualitative effect (positive vs. negative) of the feature on the model and quanitative faithfulness that the magnitude of scores reflect the true quantitative effect. We discuss under which conditions these requirements can be satisfied to which extent (local vs global). As an application of the conceptual idea, we look at differentiable classifiers over continuous data and characterize Gradient-scores as follows: every qualitatively faithful feature attribution method is qualitatively equivalent to Gradient-scores. Furthermore, if an attribution method is quantitatively faithful in the sense that changes of the output of the classifier are proportional to the scores of features, then it is either equivalent to gradient-scoring or it is based on an inferior approximation of the classifier. To illustrate the practical relevance of the theory, we experimentally demonstrate that popular attribution methods can fail to give faithful explanations in the setting where the data is continuous and the classifier differentiable.
abstract_zh: 文献中普遍认为解释方法应该忠实于它们所解释的模型，但忠实仍然是一个相当模糊的术语。我们重新审视连续数据背景下的忠实度，并为特征归因方法提出了忠实度的两种正式定义。定性忠实要求分数反映特征对模型的真实定性影响（正与负），定量忠实要求分数的大小反映真实的定量影响。我们讨论在什么条件下可以在多大程度上满足这些要求（本地与全局）。作为概念思想的应用，我们着眼于连续数据上的可微分类器，并将梯度分数描述如下：每个定性忠实的特征归因方法在定性上等价于梯度分数。此外，如果归因方法在分类器输出的变化与特征分数成正比的意义上是定量可靠的，那么它要么相当于梯度评分，要么基于分类器的劣近似。为了说明该理论的实际相关性，我们通过实验证明，在数据连续且分类器可微的情况下，流行的归因方法可能无法给出忠实的解释。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为连续数据上的可微分类器建立忠实解释的理论框架，提出定性和定量忠实性的定义，并分析梯度分数在其中的作用。
AI.motivation: 现有解释方法对'忠实性'缺乏明确定义，尤其在连续数据和可微分类器场景中，需要更严谨的理论指导以确保解释的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出定性忠实性（反映特征影响方向）和定量忠实性（反映影响程度）的双重定义，通过形式化分析证明梯度分数的等价性，并进行实验验证。
AI.result: 定性忠实方法与梯度分数定性等价；定量忠实方法若满足输出变化与特征分数成比例，则必等同于梯度评分或基于次优近似；实验表明主流方法在连续数据场景下可能不满足忠实性。
AI.conclusion: 构建了连续数据解释的理论基础，明确了梯度评分的核心地位，揭示了现有归因方法在连续场景中的局限性。

authors_text: Adrián Inés,César Domínguez,Jónathan Heras,Gadea Mata,Julio Rubio
title: A Topological Approach for Semi-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 半监督学习的拓扑方法
abstract: Nowadays, Machine Learning and Deep Learning methods have become the state-of-the-art approach to solve data classification tasks. In order to use those methods, it is necessary to acquire and label a considerable amount of data; however, this is not straightforward in some fields, since data annotation is time consuming and might require expert knowledge. This challenge can be tackled by means of semi-supervised learning methods that take advantage of both labelled and unlabelled data. In this work, we present new semi-supervised learning methods based on techniques from Topological Data Analysis (TDA), a field that is gaining importance for analysing large amounts of data with high variety and dimensionality. In particular, we have created two semi-supervised learning methods following two different topological approaches. In the former, we have used a homological approach that consists in studying the persistence diagrams associated with the data using the Bottleneck and Wasserstein distances. In the latter, we have taken into account the connectivity of the data. In addition, we have carried out a thorough analysis of the developed methods using 3 synthetic datasets, 5 structured datasets, and 2 datasets of images. The results show that the semi-supervised methods developed in this work outperform both the results obtained with models trained with only manually labelled data, and those obtained with classical semi-supervised learning methods, reaching improvements of up to a 16%.
summary: Nowadays, Machine Learning and Deep Learning methods have become the state-of-the-art approach to solve data classification tasks. In order to use those methods, it is necessary to acquire and label a considerable amount of data; however, this is not straightforward in some fields, since data annotation is time consuming and might require expert knowledge. This challenge can be tackled by means of semi-supervised learning methods that take advantage of both labelled and unlabelled data. In this work, we present new semi-supervised learning methods based on techniques from Topological Data Analysis (TDA), a field that is gaining importance for analysing large amounts of data with high variety and dimensionality. In particular, we have created two semi-supervised learning methods following two different topological approaches. In the former, we have used a homological approach that consists in studying the persistence diagrams associated with the data using the Bottleneck and Wasserstein distances. In the latter, we have taken into account the connectivity of the data. In addition, we have carried out a thorough analysis of the developed methods using 3 synthetic datasets, 5 structured datasets, and 2 datasets of images. The results show that the semi-supervised methods developed in this work outperform both the results obtained with models trained with only manually labelled data, and those obtained with classical semi-supervised learning methods, reaching improvements of up to a 16%.
abstract_zh: 如今，机器学习和深度学习方法已成为解决数据分类任务的最先进方法。为了使用这些方法，需要获取并标记大量数据；然而，这在某些领域并不简单，因为数据注释非常耗时并且可能需要专业知识。这一挑战可以通过利用标记和未标记数据的半监督学习方法来解决。在这项工作中，我们提出了基于拓扑数据分析（TDA）技术的新的半监督学习方法，该领域在分析大量具有多样性和维度的数据方面变得越来越重要。特别是，我们根据两种不同的拓扑方法创建了两种半监督学习方法。在前者中，我们使用了同源方法，即使用瓶颈距离和 Wasserstein 距离来研究与数据相关的持久性图。在后者中，我们考虑了数据的连通性。此外，我们还使用 3 个合成数据集、5 个结构化数据集和 2 个图像数据集对所开发的方法进行了彻底分析。结果表明，这项工作中开发的半监督方法优于仅使用手动标记数据训练的模型所获得的结果，以及使用经典半监督学习方法所获得的结果，提高了高达 16%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于拓扑数据分析（TDA）的新半监督学习方法，用于解决数据分类任务。
AI.motivation: 由于数据标注过程耗时且需要专业知识，本文旨在通过半监督学习方法，利用有标签和无标签数据来提高分类性能。
AI.method: 本文提出了两种基于拓扑数据分析的方法，一种是通过研究数据的持久图并使用Bottleneck和Wasserstein距离进行分析，另一种是考虑数据的连通性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，本文提出的半监督方法优于仅使用手动标注数据训练的模型和经典半监督学习方法，最高提升了16%。
AI.conclusion: 基于拓扑数据分析的半监督学习方法在分类任务中表现优异，具有较大的应用潜力。

authors_text: Kun Yi,Yixiao Ge,Xiaotong Li,Shusheng Yang,Dian Li,Jianping Wu,Ying Shan,Xiaohu Qie
title: Masked Image Modeling with Denoising Contrast
title_zh: 具有去噪对比度的蒙版图像建模
comment: Accepted by ICLR 2023. The code will be available at https://github.com/TencentARC/ConMIM
comments: Accepted by ICLR 2023. The code will be available at https://github.com/TencentARC/ConMIM
abstract: Since the development of self-supervised visual representation learning from contrastive learning to masked image modeling (MIM), there is no significant difference in essence, that is, how to design proper pretext tasks for vision dictionary look-up. MIM recently dominates this line of research with state-of-the-art performance on vision Transformers (ViTs), where the core is to enhance the patch-level visual context capturing of the network via denoising auto-encoding mechanism. Rather than tailoring image tokenizers with extra training stages as in previous works, we unleash the great potential of contrastive learning on denoising auto-encoding and introduce a pure MIM method, ConMIM, to produce simple intra-image inter-patch contrastive constraints as the sole learning objectives for masked patch prediction. We further strengthen the denoising mechanism with asymmetric designs, including image perturbations and model progress rates, to improve the network pre-training. ConMIM-pretrained models with various scales achieve competitive results on downstream image classification, semantic segmentation, object detection, and instance segmentation tasks, e.g., on ImageNet-1K classification, we achieve 83.9% top-1 accuracy with ViT-Small and 85.3% with ViT-Base without extra data for pre-training.
summary: Since the development of self-supervised visual representation learning from contrastive learning to masked image modeling (MIM), there is no significant difference in essence, that is, how to design proper pretext tasks for vision dictionary look-up. MIM recently dominates this line of research with state-of-the-art performance on vision Transformers (ViTs), where the core is to enhance the patch-level visual context capturing of the network via denoising auto-encoding mechanism. Rather than tailoring image tokenizers with extra training stages as in previous works, we unleash the great potential of contrastive learning on denoising auto-encoding and introduce a pure MIM method, ConMIM, to produce simple intra-image inter-patch contrastive constraints as the sole learning objectives for masked patch prediction. We further strengthen the denoising mechanism with asymmetric designs, including image perturbations and model progress rates, to improve the network pre-training. ConMIM-pretrained models with various scales achieve competitive results on downstream image classification, semantic segmentation, object detection, and instance segmentation tasks, e.g., on ImageNet-1K classification, we achieve 83.9% top-1 accuracy with ViT-Small and 85.3% with ViT-Base without extra data for pre-training.
abstract_zh: 自监督视觉表示学习从对比学习发展到掩模图像建模（MIM）以来，本质上并没有显着的区别，即如何为视觉词典查找设计合适的借口任务。 MIM 最近在视觉 Transformers (ViT) 上凭借最先进的性能在这一领域的研究中占据主导地位，其核心是通过去噪自动编码机制增强网络的补丁级视觉上下文捕获。我们没有像以前的工作那样通过额外的训练阶段来定制图像分词器，而是释放了去噪自动编码对比学习的巨大潜力，并引入了一种纯 MIM 方法 ConMIM，以产生简单的图像内块间对比约束，作为掩模块预测的唯一学习目标。我们通过不对称设计进一步加强去噪机制，包括图像扰动和模型进度率，以改善网络预训练。不同尺度的 ConMIM 预训练模型在下游图像分类、语义分割、对象检测和实例分割任务上取得了有竞争力的结果，例如，在 ImageNet-1K 分类上，我们使用 ViT-Small 实现了 83.9% 的 top-1 准确率，使用 ViT-Base 实现了 85.3% 的 top-1 准确率，无需额外的预训练数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于去噪对比的纯掩码图像建模方法ConMIM，通过设计简单的图像内块间对比约束来提升视觉Transformer的预训练效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过额外训练阶段定制图像分词器，而本文旨在释放对比学习在去噪自编码中的潜力，提出无需额外数据的纯MIM方法。
AI.method: 引入ConMIM方法，利用图像块间的对比约束作为唯一学习目标，并通过不对称设计（如图像扰动和模型进度率）增强去噪机制。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K分类任务中，ViT-Small和ViT-Base分别达到83.9%和85.3%的Top-1准确率，在多个下游任务中表现竞争力。
AI.conclusion: ConMIM通过简洁的对比学习框架有效提升了视觉表征能力，验证了去噪自编码与对比学习结合的优越性。

search_text: Masked Image Modeling with Denoising Contrast 具有去噪对比度的蒙版图像建模 Since the development of self-supervised visual representation learning from contrastive learning to masked image modeling (MIM), there is no significant difference in essence, that is, how to design proper pretext tasks for vision dictionary look-up. MIM recently dominates this line of research with state-of-the-art performance on vision Transformers (ViTs), where the core is to enhance the patch-level visual context capturing of the network via denoising auto-encoding mechanism. Rather than tailoring image tokenizers with extra training stages as in previous works, we unleash the great potential of contrastive learning on denoising auto-encoding and introduce a pure MIM method, ConMIM, to produce simple intra-image inter-patch contrastive constraints as the sole learning objectives for masked patch prediction. We further strengthen the denoising mechanism with asymmetric designs, including image perturbations and model progress rates, to improve the network pre-training. ConMIM-pretrained models with various scales achieve competitive results on downstream image classification, semantic segmentation, object detection, and instance segmentation tasks, e.g., on ImageNet-1K classification, we achieve 83.9% top-1 accuracy with ViT-Small and 85.3% with ViT-Base without extra data for pre-training. 自监督视觉表示学习从对比学习发展到掩模图像建模（MIM）以来，本质上并没有显着的区别，即如何为视觉词典查找设计合适的借口任务。 MIM 最近在视觉 Transformers (ViT) 上凭借最先进的性能在这一领域的研究中占据主导地位，其核心是通过去噪自动编码机制增强网络的补丁级视觉上下文捕获。我们没有像以前的工作那样通过额外的训练阶段来定制图像分词器，而是释放了去噪自动编码对比学习的巨大潜力，并引入了一种纯 MIM 方法 ConMIM，以产生简单的图像内块间对比约束，作为掩模块预测的唯一学习目标。我们通过不对称设计进一步加强去噪机制，包括图像扰动和模型进度率，以改善网络预训练。不同尺度的 ConMIM 预训练模型在下游图像分类、语义分割、对象检测和实例分割任务上取得了有竞争力的结果，例如，在 ImageNet-1K 分类上，我们使用 ViT-Small 实现了 83.9% 的 top-1 准确率，使用 ViT-Base 实现了 85.3% 的 top-1 准确率，无需额外的预训练数据。 本文提出一种基于去噪对比的纯掩码图像建模方法ConMIM，通过设计简单的图像内块间对比约束来提升视觉Transformer的预训练效果。 Kun Yi,Yixiao Ge,Xiaotong Li,Shusheng Yang,Dian Li,Jianping Wu,Ying Shan,Xiaohu Qie cs.CV

title: EXACT: How to Train Your Accuracy
title_zh: 精确：如何训练你的准确性
abstract: Classification tasks are usually evaluated in terms of accuracy. However, accuracy is discontinuous and cannot be directly optimized using gradient ascent. Popular methods minimize cross-entropy, hinge loss, or other surrogate losses, which can lead to suboptimal results. In this paper, we propose a new optimization framework by introducing stochasticity to a model's output and optimizing expected accuracy, i.e. accuracy of the stochastic model. Extensive experiments on linear models and deep image classification show that the proposed optimization method is a powerful alternative to widely used classification losses.
summary: Classification tasks are usually evaluated in terms of accuracy. However, accuracy is discontinuous and cannot be directly optimized using gradient ascent. Popular methods minimize cross-entropy, hinge loss, or other surrogate losses, which can lead to suboptimal results. In this paper, we propose a new optimization framework by introducing stochasticity to a model's output and optimizing expected accuracy, i.e. accuracy of the stochastic model. Extensive experiments on linear models and deep image classification show that the proposed optimization method is a powerful alternative to widely used classification losses.
abstract_zh: 分类任务通常根据准确性来评估。然而，精度是不连续的，不能使用梯度上升直接优化。流行的方法最大限度地减少交叉熵、铰链损失或其他替代损失，这些损失可能导致次优结果。在本文中，我们通过将随机性引入模型的输出并优化预期精度（即随机模型的精度），提出了一种新的优化框架。对线性模型和深度图像分类的大量实验表明，所提出的优化方法是广泛使用的分类损失的有力替代方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种直接优化分类任务准确率的新框架，通过在模型输出中引入随机性以优化预期准确率。
AI.motivation: 准确率作为分类任务的核心指标，因不连续性无法直接通过梯度优化，现有替代损失函数（如交叉熵）可能导致次优结果。
AI.method: 在模型输出中引入随机性，通过优化随机模型的期望准确率来替代传统损失函数。
AI.result: 在多个线性模型和深度图像分类任务中，该方法验证了其作为传统分类损失函数的有效替代方案。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为直接优化准确率提供了新思路，实验表明其在多种分类任务中优于现有替代损失方法。

authors_text: Feng Liu,Xiaosong Zhang,Zhiliang Peng,Zonghao Guo,Fang Wan,Xiangyang Ji,Qixiang Ye
title: Integrally Migrating Pre-trained Transformer Encoder-decoders for Visual Object Detection
title_zh: 集成迁移预训练的 Transformer 编码器-解码器以进行视觉对象检测
abstract: Modern object detectors have taken the advantages of backbone networks pre-trained on large scale datasets. Except for the backbone networks, however, other components such as the detector head and the feature pyramid network (FPN) remain trained from scratch, which hinders fully tapping the potential of representation models. In this study, we propose to integrally migrate pre-trained transformer encoder-decoders (imTED) to a detector, constructing a feature extraction path which is ``fully pre-trained" so that detectors' generalization capacity is maximized. The essential differences between imTED with the baseline detector are twofold: (1) migrating the pre-trained transformer decoder to the detector head while removing the randomly initialized FPN from the feature extraction path; and (2) defining a multi-scale feature modulator (MFM) to enhance scale adaptability. Such designs not only reduce randomly initialized parameters significantly but also unify detector training with representation learning intendedly. Experiments on the MS COCO object detection dataset show that imTED consistently outperforms its counterparts by $\sim$2.4 AP. Without bells and whistles, imTED improves the state-of-the-art of few-shot object detection by up to 7.6 AP. Code is available at https://github.com/LiewFeng/imTED.
summary: Modern object detectors have taken the advantages of backbone networks pre-trained on large scale datasets. Except for the backbone networks, however, other components such as the detector head and the feature pyramid network (FPN) remain trained from scratch, which hinders fully tapping the potential of representation models. In this study, we propose to integrally migrate pre-trained transformer encoder-decoders (imTED) to a detector, constructing a feature extraction path which is ``fully pre-trained" so that detectors' generalization capacity is maximized. The essential differences between imTED with the baseline detector are twofold: (1) migrating the pre-trained transformer decoder to the detector head while removing the randomly initialized FPN from the feature extraction path; and (2) defining a multi-scale feature modulator (MFM) to enhance scale adaptability. Such designs not only reduce randomly initialized parameters significantly but also unify detector training with representation learning intendedly. Experiments on the MS COCO object detection dataset show that imTED consistently outperforms its counterparts by $\sim$2.4 AP. Without bells and whistles, imTED improves the state-of-the-art of few-shot object detection by up to 7.6 AP. Code is available at https://github.com/LiewFeng/imTED.
abstract_zh: 现代物体检测器利用了在大规模数据集上预先训练的骨干网络的优势。然而，除了主干网络之外，其他组件（例如检测器头和特征金字塔网络（FPN））仍然从头开始训练，这阻碍了充分挖掘表示模型的潜力。在本研究中，我们建议将预训练的 Transformer 编码器解码器（imTED）整体迁移到检测器，构建一个“完全预训练”的特征提取路径，从而最大化检测器的泛化能力。imTED 与基线检测器之间的本质区别有两个：（1）将预训练的 Transformer 解码器迁移到检测器头，同时从特征提取路径中删除随机初始化的 FPN；（2）定义多尺度特征调制器(MFM) 来增强尺度适应性。这种设计不仅显着减少了随机初始化参数，而且还有意将检测器训练与表示学习相结合。在 MS COCO 对象检测数据集上的实验表明，imTED 的性能始终优于其同行 $\sim$2.4 AP。在没有附加功能的情况下，imTED 将少镜头对象检测的最先进性能提高了 7.6 AP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为imTED的方法，通过整合预训练的Transformer编码器-解码器到目标检测器中，以提升视觉目标检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测器虽利用预训练的主干网络，但检测头和特征金字塔网络（FPN）仍需从头训练，限制了模型表示能力的充分发挥。
AI.method: 迁移预训练Transformer解码器至检测头并移除FPN，同时设计多尺度特征调制器（MFM）以增强尺度适应性，实现检测器训练与表示学习的统一。
AI.result: 在MS COCO数据集上，imTED相较同类方法提升约2.4 AP；在少样本检测任务中最高提升7.6 AP。
AI.conclusion: 通过全面迁移预训练模型参数，imTED显著减少了随机初始化参数，有效提升了检测器的泛化能力与性能。

Except for the backbone networks, however, other components such as the detector head and the feature pyramid network (FPN) remain trained from scratch, which hinders fully tapping the potential of representation models. In this study, we propose to integrally migrate pre-trained transformer encoder-decoders (imTED) to a detector, constructing a feature extraction path which is ``fully pre-trained" so that detectors' generalization capacity is maximized. The essential differences between imTED with the baseline detector are twofold: (1) migrating the pre-trained transformer decoder to the detector head while removing the randomly initialized FPN from the feature extraction path; and (2) defining a multi-scale feature modulator (MFM) to enhance scale adaptability. Such designs not only reduce randomly initialized parameters significantly but also unify detector training with representation learning intendedly. Experiments on the MS COCO object detection dataset show that imTED consistently outperforms its counterparts by $\sim$2.4 AP. Without bells and whistles, imTED improves the state-of-the-art of few-shot object detection by up to 7.6 AP. Code is available at https://github.com/LiewFeng/imTED. 现代物体检测器利用了在大规模数据集上预先训练的骨干网络的优势。然而，除了主干网络之外，其他组件（例如检测器头和特征金字塔网络（FPN））仍然从头开始训练，这阻碍了充分挖掘表示模型的潜力。在本研究中，我们建议将预训练的 Transformer 编码器解码器（imTED）整体迁移到检测器，构建一个“完全预训练”的特征提取路径，从而最大化检测器的泛化能力。imTED 与基线检测器之间的本质区别有两个：（1）将预训练的 Transformer 解码器迁移到检测器头，同时从特征提取路径中删除随机初始化的 FPN；（2）定义多尺度特征调制器(MFM) 来增强尺度适应性。这种设计不仅显着减少了随机初始化参数，而且还有意将检测器训练与表示学习相结合。在 MS COCO 对象检测数据集上的实验表明，imTED 的性能始终优于其同行 $\sim$2.4 AP。在没有附加功能的情况下，imTED 将少镜头对象检测的最先进性能提高了 7.6 AP。 本文提出了一种名为imTED的方法，通过整合预训练的Transformer编码器-解码器到目标检测器中，以提升视觉目标检测的性能。 Feng Liu,Xiaosong Zhang,Zhiliang Peng,Zonghao Guo,Fang Wan,Xiangyang Ji,Qixiang Ye cs.CV

title: CLCNet: Rethinking of Ensemble Modeling with Classification Confidence Network
title_zh: CLCNet：用分类置信网络重新思考集成建模
abstract: In this paper, we propose a Classification Confidence Network (CLCNet) that can determine whether the classification model classifies input samples correctly. It can take a classification result in the form of vector in any dimension, and return a confidence score as output, which represents the probability of an instance being classified correctly. We can utilize CLCNet in a simple cascade structure system consisting of several SOTA (state-of-the-art) classification models, and our experiments show that the system can achieve the following advantages: 1. The system can customize the average computation requirement (FLOPs) per image while inference. 2. Under the same computation requirement, the performance of the system can exceed any model that has identical structure with the model in the system, but different in size. In fact, this is a new type of ensemble modeling. Like general ensemble modeling, it can achieve higher performance than single classification model, yet our system requires much less computation than general ensemble modeling. We have uploaded our code to a github repository: https://github.com/yaoching0/CLCNet-Rethinking-of-Ensemble-Modeling.
summary: In this paper, we propose a Classification Confidence Network (CLCNet) that can determine whether the classification model classifies input samples correctly. It can take a classification result in the form of vector in any dimension, and return a confidence score as output, which represents the probability of an instance being classified correctly. We can utilize CLCNet in a simple cascade structure system consisting of several SOTA (state-of-the-art) classification models, and our experiments show that the system can achieve the following advantages: 1. The system can customize the average computation requirement (FLOPs) per image while inference. 2. Under the same computation requirement, the performance of the system can exceed any model that has identical structure with the model in the system, but different in size. In fact, this is a new type of ensemble modeling. Like general ensemble modeling, it can achieve higher performance than single classification model, yet our system requires much less computation than general ensemble modeling. We have uploaded our code to a github repository: https://github.com/yaoching0/CLCNet-Rethinking-of-Ensemble-Modeling.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种分类置信网络（CLCNet），可以确定分类模型是否正确地对输入样本进行分类。它可以以任意维度的向量形式获取分类结果，并返回置信度得分作为输出，该置信度得分表示实例被正确分类的概率。我们可以在由多个 SOTA（state-of-the-art）分类模型组成的简单级联结构系统中使用 CLCNet，我们的实验表明该系统可以实现以下优点： 1. 系统可以在推理时定制每张图像的平均计算要求（FLOPs）。 2.在相同的计算要求下，系统的性能可以超过任何与系统中模型结构相同但规模不同的模型。事实上，这是一种新型的集成建模。与通用集成建模一样，它可以实现比单一分类模型更高的性能，但我们的系统需要的计算量比通用集成建模少得多。我们已将代码上传到 github 存储库：https://github.com/yaoching0/CLCNet-Rethinking-of-Ensemble-Modeling。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CLCNet的分类置信度网络，用于判断分类模型是否正确分类输入样本，并通过级联结构系统提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有集成模型计算成本高，难以在保持高性能的同时灵活控制计算需求，因此需要一种更高效的集成方法。
AI.method: CLCNet接收任意维度的分类结果向量，输出置信度得分表示分类正确概率，并将其嵌入级联结构系统中，结合多个SOTA分类模型实现动态计算需求控制。
AI.result: 系统可在保证相同计算量（FLOPs）的前提下超越同结构但不同尺寸的模型性能，且计算成本显著低于传统集成方法。
AI.conclusion: CLCNet通过置信度评估实现了计算需求可定制的新型集成建模，以更低的计算成本达到优于单模型和传统集成方法的性能。

title: LAGr: Label Aligned Graphs for Better Systematic Generalization in Semantic Parsing
title_zh: LAGr：标记对齐图以实现语义解析中更好的系统泛化
comment: published latest version of a paper that's already on arxiv instead of adding it as a new version. Please see arXiv:2110.07572
comments: published latest version of a paper that's already on arxiv instead of adding it as a new version. Please see arXiv:2110.07572
abstract: Semantic parsing is the task of producing structured meaning representations for natural language sentences. Recent research has pointed out that the commonly-used sequence-to-sequence (seq2seq) semantic parsers struggle to generalize systematically, i.e. to handle examples that require recombining known knowledge in novel settings. In this work, we show that better systematic generalization can be achieved by producing the meaning representation directly as a graph and not as a sequence. To this end we propose LAGr (Label Aligned Graphs), a general framework to produce semantic parses by independently predicting node and edge labels for a complete multi-layer input-aligned graph. The strongly-supervised LAGr algorithm requires aligned graphs as inputs, whereas weakly-supervised LAGr infers alignments for originally unaligned target graphs using approximate maximum-a-posteriori inference. Experiments demonstrate that LAGr achieves significant improvements in systematic generalization upon the baseline seq2seq parsers in both strongly- and weakly-supervised settings.
summary: Semantic parsing is the task of producing structured meaning representations for natural language sentences. Recent research has pointed out that the commonly-used sequence-to-sequence (seq2seq) semantic parsers struggle to generalize systematically, i.e. to handle examples that require recombining known knowledge in novel settings. In this work, we show that better systematic generalization can be achieved by producing the meaning representation directly as a graph and not as a sequence. To this end we propose LAGr (Label Aligned Graphs), a general framework to produce semantic parses by independently predicting node and edge labels for a complete multi-layer input-aligned graph. The strongly-supervised LAGr algorithm requires aligned graphs as inputs, whereas weakly-supervised LAGr infers alignments for originally unaligned target graphs using approximate maximum-a-posteriori inference. Experiments demonstrate that LAGr achieves significant improvements in systematic generalization upon the baseline seq2seq parsers in both strongly- and weakly-supervised settings.
abstract_zh: 语义解析是为自然语言句子生成结构化意义表示的任务。最近的研究指出，常用的序列到序列（seq2seq）语义解析器很难系统地泛化，即处理需要在新颖的环境中重新组合已知知识的示例。在这项工作中，我们表明，通过直接将含义表示生成为图形而不是序列，可以实现更好的系统概括。为此，我们提出了 LAGr（标签对齐图），这是一个通用框架，通过独立预测完整的多层输入对齐图的节点和边标签来生成语义解析。强监督 LAGr 算法需要对齐图作为输入，而弱监督 LAGr 使用近似最大后验推理来推断原始未对齐目标图的对齐情况。实验表明，在强监督和弱监督设置中，LAGr 在基线 seq2seq 解析器的系统泛化方面取得了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LAGr框架，通过生成图结构而非序列来提升语义解析的系统性泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统序列到序列模型在处理需要重组已知知识的新场景时泛化能力不足，需探索更有效的语义表示方法。
AI.method: LAGr框架通过独立预测节点和边标签构建多层输入对齐图，包含强监督（需对齐图输入）和弱监督（通过近似最大后验推断对齐）两种模式。
AI.result: 实验表明LAGr在强弱监督设置下均显著优于基线seq2seq模型，系统性泛化能力提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 图结构表示能有效增强语义解析的系统性泛化，LAGr框架在不同监督条件下均表现优异。

authors_text: Can Taylan Sari,Sila Kurugol,Onur Afacan,Simon K. Warfield
title: CORPS: Cost-free Rigorous Pseudo-labeling based on Similarity-ranking for Brain MRI Segmentation
title_zh: CORPS：基于相似性排序的脑 MRI 分割的免费严格伪标记
abstract: Segmentation of brain magnetic resonance images (MRI) is crucial for the analysis of the human brain and diagnosis of various brain disorders. The drawbacks of time-consuming and error-prone manual delineation procedures are aimed to be alleviated by atlas-based and supervised machine learning methods where the former methods are computationally intense and the latter methods lack a sufficiently large number of labeled data. With this motivation, we propose CORPS, a semi-supervised segmentation framework built upon a novel atlas-based pseudo-labeling method and a 3D deep convolutional neural network (DCNN) for 3D brain MRI segmentation. In this work, we propose to generate expert-level pseudo-labels for unlabeled set of images in an order based on a local intensity-based similarity score to existing labeled set of images and using a novel atlas-based label fusion method. Then, we propose to train a 3D DCNN on the combination of expert and pseudo labeled images for binary segmentation of each anatomical structure. The binary segmentation approach is proposed to avoid the poor performance of multi-class segmentation methods on limited and imbalanced data. This also allows to employ a lightweight and efficient 3D DCNN in terms of the number of filters and reserve memory resources for training the binary networks on full-scale and full-resolution 3D MRI volumes instead of 2D/3D patches or 2D slices. Thus, the proposed framework can encapsulate the spatial contiguity in each dimension and enhance context-awareness. The experimental results demonstrate the superiority of the proposed framework over the baseline method both qualitatively and quantitatively without additional labeling cost for manual labeling.
summary: Segmentation of brain magnetic resonance images (MRI) is crucial for the analysis of the human brain and diagnosis of various brain disorders. The drawbacks of time-consuming and error-prone manual delineation procedures are aimed to be alleviated by atlas-based and supervised machine learning methods where the former methods are computationally intense and the latter methods lack a sufficiently large number of labeled data. With this motivation, we propose CORPS, a semi-supervised segmentation framework built upon a novel atlas-based pseudo-labeling method and a 3D deep convolutional neural network (DCNN) for 3D brain MRI segmentation. In this work, we propose to generate expert-level pseudo-labels for unlabeled set of images in an order based on a local intensity-based similarity score to existing labeled set of images and using a novel atlas-based label fusion method. Then, we propose to train a 3D DCNN on the combination of expert and pseudo labeled images for binary segmentation of each anatomical structure. The binary segmentation approach is proposed to avoid the poor performance of multi-class segmentation methods on limited and imbalanced data. This also allows to employ a lightweight and efficient 3D DCNN in terms of the number of filters and reserve memory resources for training the binary networks on full-scale and full-resolution 3D MRI volumes instead of 2D/3D patches or 2D slices. Thus, the proposed framework can encapsulate the spatial contiguity in each dimension and enhance context-awareness. The experimental results demonstrate the superiority of the proposed framework over the baseline method both qualitatively and quantitatively without additional labeling cost for manual labeling.
abstract_zh: 脑磁共振图像（MRI）的分割对于分析人脑和诊断各种脑部疾病至关重要。耗时且容易出错的手动描绘过程的缺点旨在通过基于图集和监督的机器学习方法来缓解，其中前一种方法计算量大，而后一种方法缺乏足够大量的标记数据。出于这个动机，我们提出了 CORPS，这是一种半监督分割框架，建立在一种新颖的基于图集的伪标记方法和用于 3D 脑 MRI 分割的 3D 深度卷积神经网络 (DCNN) 之上。在这项工作中，我们建议按照基于与现有标记图像集的局部强度相似度得分的顺序，并使用一种新颖的基于图集的标签融合方法，为未标记图像集生成专家级伪标签。然后，我们建议结合专家图像和伪标记图像来训练 3D DCNN，以对每个解剖结构进行二进制分割。提出二元分割方法是为了避免多类分割方法在有限且不平衡的数据上表现不佳。这还允许在滤波器数量方面采用轻量级且高效的 3D DCNN，并保留内存资源，用于在全尺寸和全分辨率 3D MRI 体积（而不是 2D/3D 补丁或 2D 切片）上训练二进制网络。因此，所提出的框架可以封装每个维度的空间连续性并增强上下文感知。实验结果证明了所提出的框架在定性和定量上都优于基线方法，并且无需额外的手动标记成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CORPS框架，通过基于相似度排序的伪标签生成方法，实现无需额外标注成本的脑部MRI分割。
AI.motivation: 传统手动分割耗时且易出错，基于图谱的方法计算量大，监督学习方法缺乏足够标注数据，需开发低成本高效分割方案。
AI.method: 利用局部强度相似度排序生成专家级伪标签，结合图谱标签融合方法，训练轻量级3D DCNN进行二值分割，避免多分类方法在数据不足时的性能问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架在定性和定量指标上均优于基线方法，且无需额外人工标注成本。
AI.conclusion: CORPS通过伪标签生成与二值分割策略，有效提升了脑MRI分割的效率与准确性，为数据有限场景提供可行方案。

search_text: CORPS: Cost-free Rigorous Pseudo-labeling based on Similarity-ranking for Brain MRI Segmentation CORPS：基于相似性排序的脑 MRI 分割的免费严格伪标记 Segmentation of brain magnetic resonance images (MRI) is crucial for the analysis of the human brain and diagnosis of various brain disorders. The drawbacks of time-consuming and error-prone manual delineation procedures are aimed to be alleviated by atlas-based and supervised machine learning methods where the former methods are computationally intense and the latter methods lack a sufficiently large number of labeled data. With this motivation, we propose CORPS, a semi-supervised segmentation framework built upon a novel atlas-based pseudo-labeling method and a 3D deep convolutional neural network (DCNN) for 3D brain MRI segmentation. In this work, we propose to generate expert-level pseudo-labels for unlabeled set of images in an order based on a local intensity-based similarity score to existing labeled set of images and using a novel atlas-based label fusion method. Then, we propose to train a 3D DCNN on the combination of expert and pseudo labeled images for binary segmentation of each anatomical structure. The binary segmentation approach is proposed to avoid the poor performance of multi-class segmentation methods on limited and imbalanced data. This also allows to employ a lightweight and efficient 3D DCNN in terms of the number of filters and reserve memory resources for training the binary networks on full-scale and full-resolution 3D MRI volumes instead of 2D/3D patches or 2D slices. Thus, the proposed framework can encapsulate the spatial contiguity in each dimension and enhance context-awareness. The experimental results demonstrate the superiority of the proposed framework over the baseline method both qualitatively and quantitatively without additional labeling cost for manual labeling. 脑磁共振图像（MRI）的分割对于分析人脑和诊断各种脑部疾病至关重要。耗时且容易出错的手动描绘过程的缺点旨在通过基于图集和监督的机器学习方法来缓解，其中前一种方法计算量大，而后一种方法缺乏足够大量的标记数据。出于这个动机，我们提出了 CORPS，这是一种半监督分割框架，建立在一种新颖的基于图集的伪标记方法和用于 3D 脑 MRI 分割的 3D 深度卷积神经网络 (DCNN) 之上。在这项工作中，我们建议按照基于与现有标记图像集的局部强度相似度得分的顺序，并使用一种新颖的基于图集的标签融合方法，为未标记图像集生成专家级伪标签。然后，我们建议结合专家图像和伪标记图像来训练 3D DCNN，以对每个解剖结构进行二进制分割。提出二元分割方法是为了避免多类分割方法在有限且不平衡的数据上表现不佳。这还允许在滤波器数量方面采用轻量级且高效的 3D DCNN，并保留内存资源，用于在全尺寸和全分辨率 3D MRI 体积（而不是 2D/3D 补丁或 2D 切片）上训练二进制网络。因此，所提出的框架可以封装每个维度的空间连续性并增强上下文感知。实验结果证明了所提出的框架在定性和定量上都优于基线方法，并且无需额外的手动标记成本。 本文提出CORPS框架，通过基于相似度排序的伪标签生成方法，实现无需额外标注成本的脑部MRI分割。 Can Taylan Sari,Sila Kurugol,Onur Afacan,Simon K. Warfield cs.CV

title: A Comparative Study of Feature Expansion Unit for 3D Point Cloud Upsampling
title_zh: 3D点云上采样特征扩展单元的比较研究
abstract: Recently, deep learning methods have shown great success in 3D point cloud upsampling. Among these methods, many feature expansion units were proposed to complete point expansion at the end. In this paper, we compare various feature expansion units by both theoretical analysis and quantitative experiments. We show that most of the existing feature expansion units process each point feature independently, while ignoring the feature interaction among different points. Further, inspired by upsampling module of image super-resolution and recent success of dynamic graph CNN on point clouds, we propose a novel feature expansion units named ProEdgeShuffle. Experiments show that our proposed method can achieve considerable improvement over previous feature expansion units.
summary: Recently, deep learning methods have shown great success in 3D point cloud upsampling. Among these methods, many feature expansion units were proposed to complete point expansion at the end. In this paper, we compare various feature expansion units by both theoretical analysis and quantitative experiments. We show that most of the existing feature expansion units process each point feature independently, while ignoring the feature interaction among different points. Further, inspired by upsampling module of image super-resolution and recent success of dynamic graph CNN on point clouds, we propose a novel feature expansion units named ProEdgeShuffle. Experiments show that our proposed method can achieve considerable improvement over previous feature expansion units.
abstract_zh: 最近，深度学习方法在 3D 点云上采样方面取得了巨大成功。在这些方法中，提出了许多特征扩展单元来完成最后的点扩展。在本文中，我们通过理论分析和定量实验来比较各种特征扩展单元。我们表明，大多数现有的特征扩展单元独立处理每个点特征，而忽略了不同点之间的特征交互。此外，受图像超分辨率上采样模块和点云上动态图 CNN 最近成功的启发，我们提出了一种名为 ProEdgeShuffle 的新颖特征扩展单元。实验表明，我们提出的方法可以比以前的特征扩展单元取得相当大的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了多种用于3D点云上采样的特征扩展单元，并提出了一种新的ProEdgeShuffle方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的特征扩展单元在处理每个点特征时独立，忽略了不同点之间的特征交互，因此需要一种新的方法来改进这一点。
AI.method: 受图像超分辨率上采样模块和动态图卷积网络的启发，提出了一种新的特征扩展单元ProEdgeShuffle。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提出的方法在性能上显著优于之前的特征扩展单元。
AI.conclusion: ProEdgeShuffle方法通过考虑点之间的特征交互，有效提升了3D点云上采样的性能。

authors_text: Yu Zhang,Zhiqiang Gong,Yichuang Zhang,YongQian Li,Kangcheng Bin,Jiahao Qi,Wei Xue,Ping Zhong
title: Transferable Physical Attack against Object Detection with Separable Attention
title_zh: 针对具有可分离注意力的对象检测的可转移物理攻击
abstract: Transferable adversarial attack is always in the spotlight since deep learning models have been demonstrated to be vulnerable to adversarial samples. However, existing physical attack methods do not pay enough attention on transferability to unseen models, thus leading to the poor performance of black-box attack.In this paper, we put forward a novel method of generating physically realizable adversarial camouflage to achieve transferable attack against detection models. More specifically, we first introduce multi-scale attention maps based on detection models to capture features of objects with various resolutions. Meanwhile, we adopt a sequence of composite transformations to obtain the averaged attention maps, which could curb model-specific noise in the attention and thus further boost transferability. Unlike the general visualization interpretation methods where model attention should be put on the foreground object as much as possible, we carry out attack on separable attention from the opposite perspective, i.e. suppressing attention of the foreground and enhancing that of the background. Consequently, transferable adversarial camouflage could be yielded efficiently with our novel attention-based loss function. Extensive comparison experiments verify the superiority of our method to state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Transferable adversarial attack is always in the spotlight since deep learning models have been demonstrated to be vulnerable to adversarial samples. However, existing physical attack methods do not pay enough attention on transferability to unseen models, thus leading to the poor performance of black-box attack.In this paper, we put forward a novel method of generating physically realizable adversarial camouflage to achieve transferable attack against detection models. More specifically, we first introduce multi-scale attention maps based on detection models to capture features of objects with various resolutions. Meanwhile, we adopt a sequence of composite transformations to obtain the averaged attention maps, which could curb model-specific noise in the attention and thus further boost transferability. Unlike the general visualization interpretation methods where model attention should be put on the foreground object as much as possible, we carry out attack on separable attention from the opposite perspective, i.e. suppressing attention of the foreground and enhancing that of the background. Consequently, transferable adversarial camouflage could be yielded efficiently with our novel attention-based loss function. Extensive comparison experiments verify the superiority of our method to state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 可转移的对抗性攻击始终受到关注，因为深度学习模型已被证明容易受到对抗性样本的攻击。然而，现有的物理攻击方法对未见过的模型的可转移性没有给予足够的重视，从而导致黑盒攻击的性能较差。在本文中，我们提出了一种生成物理可实现的对抗性伪装的新方法，以实现针对检测模型的可转移攻击。更具体地说，我们首先引入基于检测模型的多尺度注意力图来捕获具有不同分辨率的对象的特征。同时，我们采用一系列复合变换来获得平均注意力图，这可以抑制注意力中模型特定的噪声，从而进一步提高可转移性。与一般的可视化解释方法中模型注意力应尽可能放在前景对象上不同，我们从相反的角度对可分离注意力进行攻击，即抑制前景的注意力并增强背景的注意力。因此，通过我们新颖的基于注意力的损失函数可以有效地产生可转移的对抗性伪装。广泛的比较实验验证了我们的方法相对于最先进方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于可分离注意力的可迁移物理攻击方法，用于生成针对目标检测模型的物理可实现对抗样本。
AI.motivation: 现有物理攻击方法在迁移性上不足，无法有效进行黑盒攻击，需提升对抗样本的迁移能力。
AI.method: 引入多尺度注意力图，采用复合变换生成平均注意力图以减少噪声，并通过抑制前景、增强背景的注意力，结合新的损失函数生成对抗伪装。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法在迁移性上的优越性，显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了对抗样本的迁移性，为物理攻击目标检测模型提供了新思路。

Unlike the general visualization interpretation methods where model attention should be put on the foreground object as much as possible, we carry out attack on separable attention from the opposite perspective, i.e. suppressing attention of the foreground and enhancing that of the background. Consequently, transferable adversarial camouflage could be yielded efficiently with our novel attention-based loss function. Extensive comparison experiments verify the superiority of our method to state-of-the-art methods. 可转移的对抗性攻击始终受到关注，因为深度学习模型已被证明容易受到对抗性样本的攻击。然而，现有的物理攻击方法对未见过的模型的可转移性没有给予足够的重视，从而导致黑盒攻击的性能较差。在本文中，我们提出了一种生成物理可实现的对抗性伪装的新方法，以实现针对检测模型的可转移攻击。更具体地说，我们首先引入基于检测模型的多尺度注意力图来捕获具有不同分辨率的对象的特征。同时，我们采用一系列复合变换来获得平均注意力图，这可以抑制注意力中模型特定的噪声，从而进一步提高可转移性。与一般的可视化解释方法中模型注意力应尽可能放在前景对象上不同，我们从相反的角度对可分离注意力进行攻击，即抑制前景的注意力并增强背景的注意力。因此，通过我们新颖的基于注意力的损失函数可以有效地产生可转移的对抗性伪装。广泛的比较实验验证了我们的方法相对于最先进方法的优越性。 提出一种基于可分离注意力的可迁移物理攻击方法，用于生成针对目标检测模型的物理可实现对抗样本。 Yu Zhang,Zhiqiang Gong,Yichuang Zhang,YongQian Li,Kangcheng Bin,Jiahao Qi,Wei Xue,Ping Zhong cs.CV

title: On Trace of PGD-Like Adversarial Attacks
title_zh: 类 PGD 对抗性攻击的追踪
abstract: Adversarial attacks pose safety and security concerns to deep learning applications, but their characteristics are under-explored. Yet largely imperceptible, a strong trace could have been left by PGD-like attacks in an adversarial example. Recall that PGD-like attacks trigger the ``local linearity'' of a network, which implies different extents of linearity for benign or adversarial examples. Inspired by this, we construct an Adversarial Response Characteristics (ARC) feature to reflect the model's gradient consistency around the input to indicate the extent of linearity. Under certain conditions, it qualitatively shows a gradually varying pattern from benign example to adversarial example, as the latter leads to Sequel Attack Effect (SAE). To quantitatively evaluate the effectiveness of ARC, we conduct experiments on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet for attack detection and attack type recognition in a challenging setting. The results suggest that SAE is an effective and unique trace of PGD-like attacks reflected through the ARC feature. The ARC feature is intuitive, light-weighted, non-intrusive, and data-undemanding.
summary: Adversarial attacks pose safety and security concerns to deep learning applications, but their characteristics are under-explored. Yet largely imperceptible, a strong trace could have been left by PGD-like attacks in an adversarial example. Recall that PGD-like attacks trigger the ``local linearity'' of a network, which implies different extents of linearity for benign or adversarial examples. Inspired by this, we construct an Adversarial Response Characteristics (ARC) feature to reflect the model's gradient consistency around the input to indicate the extent of linearity. Under certain conditions, it qualitatively shows a gradually varying pattern from benign example to adversarial example, as the latter leads to Sequel Attack Effect (SAE). To quantitatively evaluate the effectiveness of ARC, we conduct experiments on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet for attack detection and attack type recognition in a challenging setting. The results suggest that SAE is an effective and unique trace of PGD-like attacks reflected through the ARC feature. The ARC feature is intuitive, light-weighted, non-intrusive, and data-undemanding.
abstract_zh: 对抗性攻击给深度学习应用带来了安全隐患，但其特征尚未得到充分探索。然而，在对抗性示例中，类似 PGD 的攻击可能会留下强烈的痕迹，但这种痕迹在很大程度上是难以察觉的。回想一下，类似 PGD 的攻击会触发网络的“局部线性”，这意味着良性或对抗性示例的线性程度不同。受此启发，我们构建了对抗响应特征（ARC）特征来反映模型围绕输入的梯度一致性，以指示线性程度。在某些条件下，它定性地表现出从良性示例到对抗性示例逐渐变化的模式，因为后者会导致后续攻击效应（SAE）。为了定量评估 ARC 的有效性，我们在 CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet 上进行了实验，以在具有挑战性的环境中进行攻击检测和攻击类型识别。结果表明，SAE 是通过 ARC 特征反映的 PGD 类攻击的有效且独特的踪迹。 ARC 功能直观、轻量级、非侵入性且对数据要求不高。

AI.tldr: 本文研究PGD类对抗攻击在对抗样本中留下的可检测痕迹，并提出基于梯度一致性的ARC特征用于攻击检测与类型识别。
AI.motivation: 对抗攻击威胁深度学习安全，但其痕迹特征缺乏系统研究。PGD类攻击利用模型局部线性特性，可能在样本中留下可量化的攻击痕迹。
AI.method: 构建Adversarial Response Characteristics (ARC) 特征，通过分析模型梯度一致性反映输入的局部线性程度，结合Sequel Attack Effect (SAE) 理论实现攻击检测。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和ImageNet数据集上验证ARC特征有效性，实验显示SAE模式能显著区分良性样本与PGD类攻击样本。
AI.conclusion: ARC特征为PGD类攻击提供了直观、轻量且无需额外数据的检测方案，SAE模式是此类攻击的唯一可量化痕迹。

title: Multi-Armed Bandits in Brain-Computer Interfaces
title_zh: 脑机接口中的多臂强盗
abstract: The multi-armed bandit (MAB) problem models a decision-maker that optimizes its actions based on current and acquired new knowledge to maximize its reward. This type of online decision is prominent in many procedures of Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCIs) and MAB has previously been used to investigate, e.g., what mental commands to use to optimize BCI performance. However, MAB optimization in the context of BCI is still relatively unexplored, even though it has the potential to improve BCI performance during both calibration and real-time implementation. Therefore, this review aims to further introduce MABs to the BCI community. The review includes a background on MAB problems and standard solution methods, and interpretations related to BCI systems. Moreover, it includes state-of-the-art concepts of MAB in BCI and suggestions for future research.
summary: The multi-armed bandit (MAB) problem models a decision-maker that optimizes its actions based on current and acquired new knowledge to maximize its reward. This type of online decision is prominent in many procedures of Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCIs) and MAB has previously been used to investigate, e.g., what mental commands to use to optimize BCI performance. However, MAB optimization in the context of BCI is still relatively unexplored, even though it has the potential to improve BCI performance during both calibration and real-time implementation. Therefore, this review aims to further introduce MABs to the BCI community. The review includes a background on MAB problems and standard solution methods, and interpretations related to BCI systems. Moreover, it includes state-of-the-art concepts of MAB in BCI and suggestions for future research.
abstract_zh: 多臂老虎机 (MAB) 问题模拟了一个决策者，该决策者根据当前知识和获得的新知识来优化其行动，以最大化其回报。这种类型的在线决策在脑机接口 (BCI) 的许多程序中都很突出，MAB 以前曾用于研究，例如，使用哪些心理命令来优化 BCI 性能。然而，BCI 背景下的 MAB 优化仍然相对未经探索，尽管它有可能在校准和实时实施期间提高 BCI 性能。因此，本次综述旨在进一步将 MAB 引入 BCI 界。该评论包括 MAB 问题和标准解决方法的背景，以及与 BCI 系统相关的解释。此外，它还包括 BCI 中 MAB 的最新概念以及对未来研究的建议。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了多臂老虎机（MAB）方法在脑机接口（BCI）中的应用潜力，并探讨了其在优化BCI性能中的未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管MAB已被用于BCI指令优化，但其在BCI领域的研究仍较为有限，缺乏系统性总结和深入探索，亟需推动该方法在BCI校准和实时应用中的进一步研究。
AI.method: 通过回顾MAB问题的基本框架及经典求解方法，结合BCI系统的工作原理，分析现有MAB在BCI中的应用案例，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.result: 总结了MAB在BCI中的应用场景与挑战，指出其在校准阶段和实时决策中的优化潜力，并为后续研究提供了方法论建议。
AI.conclusion: MAB为BCI性能提升提供了新思路，但需结合BCI特性设计更高效的算法，未来研究应关注动态环境适应性和实际应用验证。

authors_text: Christian Alrabbaa,Franz Baader,Stefan Borgwardt,Raimund Dachselt,Patrick Koopmann,Julián Méndez
title: Evonne: Interactive Proof Visualization for Description Logics (System Description) -- Extended Version
title_zh: Evonne：描述逻辑的交互式证明可视化（系统描述）--扩展版本
abstract: Explanations for description logic (DL) entailments provide important support for the maintenance of large ontologies. The "justifications" usually employed for this purpose in ontology editors pinpoint the parts of the ontology responsible for a given entailment. Proofs for entailments make the intermediate reasoning steps explicit, and thus explain how a consequence can actually be derived. We present an interactive system for exploring description logic proofs, called Evonne, which visualizes proofs of consequences for ontologies written in expressive DLs. We describe the methods used for computing those proofs, together with a feature called signature-based proof condensation. Moreover, we evaluate the quality of generated proofs using real ontologies.
summary: Explanations for description logic (DL) entailments provide important support for the maintenance of large ontologies. The "justifications" usually employed for this purpose in ontology editors pinpoint the parts of the ontology responsible for a given entailment. Proofs for entailments make the intermediate reasoning steps explicit, and thus explain how a consequence can actually be derived. We present an interactive system for exploring description logic proofs, called Evonne, which visualizes proofs of consequences for ontologies written in expressive DLs. We describe the methods used for computing those proofs, together with a feature called signature-based proof condensation. Moreover, we evaluate the quality of generated proofs using real ontologies.
abstract_zh: 描述逻辑（DL）蕴涵的解释为大型本体的维护提供了重要支持。本体编辑器通常为此目的而使用的“理由”精确地指出本体中负责给定蕴含的部分。蕴涵的证明使中间推理步骤变得明确，从而解释了如何实际导出结果。我们提出了一个用于探索描述逻辑证明的交互式系统，称为 Evonne，它可视化用表达性 DL 编写的本体的后果证明。我们描述了用于计算这些证明的方法，以及称为基于签名的证明压缩的功能。此外，我们使用真实的本体来评估生成的证明的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为Evonne的交互式系统，用于可视化描述逻辑（DL）的证明，帮助用户理解本体蕴含的推理过程。
AI.motivation: 现有本体编辑器通过定位蕴含来源的'justifications'支持本体维护，但缺乏展示推理步骤的证明，导致用户难以理解后果的推导过程。
AI.method: 开发Evonne系统，结合基于签名的证明压缩技术，生成并可视化DL证明，并通过真实本体评估证明质量。
AI.result: 系统能够有效生成和压缩证明，实验表明其可帮助用户更清晰地理解本体蕴含的推理逻辑。
AI.conclusion: Evonne通过交互式证明可视化和压缩技术，提升了大型本体维护中对蕴含推理的理解与可追溯性。

search_text: Evonne: Interactive Proof Visualization for Description Logics (System Description) -- Extended Version Evonne：描述逻辑的交互式证明可视化（系统描述）--扩展版本 Explanations for description logic (DL) entailments provide important support for the maintenance of large ontologies. The "justifications" usually employed for this purpose in ontology editors pinpoint the parts of the ontology responsible for a given entailment. Proofs for entailments make the intermediate reasoning steps explicit, and thus explain how a consequence can actually be derived. We present an interactive system for exploring description logic proofs, called Evonne, which visualizes proofs of consequences for ontologies written in expressive DLs. We describe the methods used for computing those proofs, together with a feature called signature-based proof condensation. Moreover, we evaluate the quality of generated proofs using real ontologies. 描述逻辑（DL）蕴涵的解释为大型本体的维护提供了重要支持。本体编辑器通常为此目的而使用的“理由”精确地指出本体中负责给定蕴含的部分。蕴涵的证明使中间推理步骤变得明确，从而解释了如何实际导出结果。我们提出了一个用于探索描述逻辑证明的交互式系统，称为 Evonne，它可视化用表达性 DL 编写的本体的后果证明。我们描述了用于计算这些证明的方法，以及称为基于签名的证明压缩的功能。此外，我们使用真实的本体来评估生成的证明的质量。 本文提出一个名为Evonne的交互式系统，用于可视化描述逻辑（DL）的证明，帮助用户理解本体蕴含的推理过程。 Christian Alrabbaa,Franz Baader,Stefan Borgwardt,Raimund Dachselt,Patrick Koopmann,Julián Méndez cs.LO,cs.AI

authors_text: Xin Xia,Jiashi Li,Jie Wu,Xing Wang,Xuefeng Xiao,Min Zheng,Rui Wang
title: TRT-ViT: TensorRT-oriented Vision Transformer
title_zh: TRT-ViT：面向TensorRT的视觉变压器
abstract: We revisit the existing excellent Transformers from the perspective of practical application. Most of them are not even as efficient as the basic ResNets series and deviate from the realistic deployment scenario. It may be due to the current criterion to measure computation efficiency, such as FLOPs or parameters is one-sided, sub-optimal, and hardware-insensitive. Thus, this paper directly treats the TensorRT latency on the specific hardware as an efficiency metric, which provides more comprehensive feedback involving computational capacity, memory cost, and bandwidth. Based on a series of controlled experiments, this work derives four practical guidelines for TensorRT-oriented and deployment-friendly network design, e.g., early CNN and late Transformer at stage-level, early Transformer and late CNN at block-level. Accordingly, a family of TensortRT-oriented Transformers is presented, abbreviated as TRT-ViT. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TRT-ViT significantly outperforms existing ConvNets and vision Transformers with respect to the latency/accuracy trade-off across diverse visual tasks, e.g., image classification, object detection and semantic segmentation. For example, at 82.7% ImageNet-1k top-1 accuracy, TRT-ViT is 2.7$\times$ faster than CSWin and 2.0$\times$ faster than Twins. On the MS-COCO object detection task, TRT-ViT achieves comparable performance with Twins, while the inference speed is increased by 2.8$\times$.
summary: We revisit the existing excellent Transformers from the perspective of practical application. Most of them are not even as efficient as the basic ResNets series and deviate from the realistic deployment scenario. It may be due to the current criterion to measure computation efficiency, such as FLOPs or parameters is one-sided, sub-optimal, and hardware-insensitive. Thus, this paper directly treats the TensorRT latency on the specific hardware as an efficiency metric, which provides more comprehensive feedback involving computational capacity, memory cost, and bandwidth. Based on a series of controlled experiments, this work derives four practical guidelines for TensorRT-oriented and deployment-friendly network design, e.g., early CNN and late Transformer at stage-level, early Transformer and late CNN at block-level. Accordingly, a family of TensortRT-oriented Transformers is presented, abbreviated as TRT-ViT. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TRT-ViT significantly outperforms existing ConvNets and vision Transformers with respect to the latency/accuracy trade-off across diverse visual tasks, e.g., image classification, object detection and semantic segmentation. For example, at 82.7% ImageNet-1k top-1 accuracy, TRT-ViT is 2.7$\times$ faster than CSWin and 2.0$\times$ faster than Twins. On the MS-COCO object detection task, TRT-ViT achieves comparable performance with Twins, while the inference speed is increased by 2.8$\times$.
abstract_zh: 我们从实际应用的角度重新审视现有的优秀Transformer。其中大多数甚至不如基本的 ResNets 系列那么高效，并且偏离了实际的部署场景。这可能是由于当前衡量计算效率的标准，例如 FLOP 或参数是片面的、次优的、对硬件不敏感的。因此，本文直接将特定硬件上的 TensorRT 延迟视为效率指标，提供了涉及计算能力、内存成本和带宽的更全面的反馈。基于一系列受控实验，这项工作得出了面向 TensorRT 和部署友好的网络设计的四个实用指南，例如阶段级的早期 CNN 和后期 Transformer、块级的早期 Transformer 和后期 CNN。因此，提出了一系列面向 TensortRT 的 Transformer，缩写为 TRT-ViT。大量实验表明，TRT-ViT 在不同视觉任务（例如图像分类、对象检测和语义分割）的延迟/准确性权衡方面显着优于现有的 ConvNet 和视觉 Transformer。例如，在 ImageNet-1k top-1 准确率达到 82.7% 时，TRT-ViT 比 CSWin 快 2.7$\times$，比 Twins 快 2.0$\times$。在MS-COCO目标检测任务上，TRT-ViT实现了与Twins相当的性能，同时推理速度提高了2.8$\times$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TRT-ViT，一种面向TensorRT部署的视觉Transformer模型，通过优化计算效率和硬件适配性提升模型推理速度。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer模型在实际部署中效率不足，传统指标（如FLOPs）无法全面反映硬件上的真实性能，需引入硬件感知的TensorRT延迟作为评估标准。
AI.method: 基于TensorRT延迟指标设计四条网络优化准则，结合CNN与Transformer的分阶段结构（如早期CNN+晚期Transformer），构建TRT-ViT模型家族。
AI.result: TRT-ViT在ImageNet-1k分类任务中达到82.7%准确率，比CSWin快2.7倍，比Twins快2.0倍；在MS-COCO目标检测中性能与Twins相当但速度提升2.8倍。
AI.conclusion: TRT-ViT通过硬件导向的设计准则，在延迟与精度的权衡上显著优于现有模型，为视觉Transformer的高效部署提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yiheng Liu,Enjie Ge,Mengshen He,Zhengliang Liu,Shijie Zhao,Xintao Hu,Dajiang Zhu,Tianming Liu,Bao Ge
title: Discovering Dynamic Functional Brain Networks via Spatial and Channel-wise Attention
title_zh: 通过空间和通道注意力发现动态功能大脑网络
comment: 12 pages,6 figures, submitted to 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: 12 pages,6 figures, submitted to 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: Using deep learning models to recognize functional brain networks (FBNs) in functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) has been attracting increasing interest recently. However, most existing work focuses on detecting static FBNs from entire fMRI signals, such as correlation-based functional connectivity. Sliding-window is a widely used strategy to capture the dynamics of FBNs, but it is still limited in representing intrinsic functional interactive dynamics at each time step. And the number of FBNs usually need to be set manually. More over, due to the complexity of dynamic interactions in brain, traditional linear and shallow models are insufficient in identifying complex and spatially overlapped FBNs across each time step. In this paper, we propose a novel Spatial and Channel-wise Attention Autoencoder (SCAAE) for discovering FBNs dynamically. The core idea of SCAAE is to apply attention mechanism to FBNs construction. Specifically, we designed two attention modules: 1) spatial-wise attention (SA) module to discover FBNs in the spatial domain and 2) a channel-wise attention (CA) module to weigh the channels for selecting the FBNs automatically. We evaluated our approach on ADHD200 dataset and our results indicate that the proposed SCAAE method can effectively recover the dynamic changes of the FBNs at each fMRI time step, without using sliding windows. More importantly, our proposed hybrid attention modules (SA and CA) do not enforce assumptions of linearity and independence as previous methods, and thus provide a novel approach to better understanding dynamic functional brain networks.
summary: Using deep learning models to recognize functional brain networks (FBNs) in functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) has been attracting increasing interest recently. However, most existing work focuses on detecting static FBNs from entire fMRI signals, such as correlation-based functional connectivity. Sliding-window is a widely used strategy to capture the dynamics of FBNs, but it is still limited in representing intrinsic functional interactive dynamics at each time step. And the number of FBNs usually need to be set manually. More over, due to the complexity of dynamic interactions in brain, traditional linear and shallow models are insufficient in identifying complex and spatially overlapped FBNs across each time step. In this paper, we propose a novel Spatial and Channel-wise Attention Autoencoder (SCAAE) for discovering FBNs dynamically. The core idea of SCAAE is to apply attention mechanism to FBNs construction. Specifically, we designed two attention modules: 1) spatial-wise attention (SA) module to discover FBNs in the spatial domain and 2) a channel-wise attention (CA) module to weigh the channels for selecting the FBNs automatically. We evaluated our approach on ADHD200 dataset and our results indicate that the proposed SCAAE method can effectively recover the dynamic changes of the FBNs at each fMRI time step, without using sliding windows. More importantly, our proposed hybrid attention modules (SA and CA) do not enforce assumptions of linearity and independence as previous methods, and thus provide a novel approach to better understanding dynamic functional brain networks.
abstract_zh: 使用深度学习模型来识别功能磁共振成像（fMRI）中的功能脑网络（FBN）最近引起了越来越多的兴趣。然而，大多数现有工作侧重于从整个功能磁共振成像信号中检测静态 FBN，例如基于相关性的功能连接。滑动窗口是一种广泛使用的捕获 FBN 动态的策略，但它在表示每个时间步的内在功能交互动态方面仍然受到限制。并且FBN的数量通常需要手动设置。此外，由于大脑中动态交互的复杂性，传统的线性和浅层模型不足以识别每个时间步长的复杂且空间重叠的 FBN。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的空间和通道注意力自动编码器（SCAAE），用于动态发现 FBN。 SCAAE的核心思想是将注意力机制应用于FBN的构建中。具体来说，我们设计了两个注意力模块：1）空间注意力（SA）模块，用于发现空间域中的FBN；2）通道注意力（CA）模块，用于权衡通道以自动选择FBN。我们在 ADHD200 数据集上评估了我们的方法，结果表明所提出的 SCAAE 方法可以有效地恢复每个 fMRI 时间步长的 FBN 的动态变化，而无需使用滑动窗口。更重要的是，我们提出的混合注意力模块（SA和CA）不像以前的方法那样强制执行线性和独立性的假设，从而提供了一种更好地理解动态功能大脑网络的新方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于空间与通道注意力机制的自编码器（SCAAE），用于动态发现功能脑网络（FBNs），无需滑动窗口即可捕捉fMRI时间步长的动态变化。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过滑动窗口捕捉FBN动态，但受限于手动设置网络数量及线性模型对复杂脑交互的表达不足，难以准确反映动态功能交互特性。
AI.method: 设计包含空间注意力模块（SA）和通道注意力模块（CA）的SCAAE模型，SA用于空间域FBN发现，CA自动加权通道选择FBN，无需滑动窗口和线性假设。
AI.result: 在ADHD200数据集上验证，SCAAE能有效恢复每个fMRI时间步长的FBN动态变化，且混合注意力模块突破了传统方法的线性与独立性假设。
AI.conclusion: SCAAE通过注意力机制提供了无需滑动窗口和线性约束的新型动态FBN分析框架，为理解复杂脑功能交互提供了新思路。

ai_content.result: 在ADHD200数据集上验证，SCAAE能有效恢复每个fMRI时间步长的FBN动态变化，且混合注意力模块突破了传统方法的线性与独立性假设。

search_text: Discovering Dynamic Functional Brain Networks via Spatial and Channel-wise Attention 通过空间和通道注意力发现动态功能大脑网络 Using deep learning models to recognize functional brain networks (FBNs) in functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) has been attracting increasing interest recently. However, most existing work focuses on detecting static FBNs from entire fMRI signals, such as correlation-based functional connectivity. Sliding-window is a widely used strategy to capture the dynamics of FBNs, but it is still limited in representing intrinsic functional interactive dynamics at each time step. And the number of FBNs usually need to be set manually. More over, due to the complexity of dynamic interactions in brain, traditional linear and shallow models are insufficient in identifying complex and spatially overlapped FBNs across each time step. In this paper, we propose a novel Spatial and Channel-wise Attention Autoencoder (SCAAE) for discovering FBNs dynamically. The core idea of SCAAE is to apply attention mechanism to FBNs construction. Specifically, we designed two attention modules: 1) spatial-wise attention (SA) module to discover FBNs in the spatial domain and 2) a channel-wise attention (CA) module to weigh the channels for selecting the FBNs automatically. We evaluated our approach on ADHD200 dataset and our results indicate that the proposed SCAAE method can effectively recover the dynamic changes of the FBNs at each fMRI time step, without using sliding windows. More importantly, our proposed hybrid attention modules (SA and CA) do not enforce assumptions of linearity and independence as previous methods, and thus provide a novel approach to better understanding dynamic functional brain networks. 使用深度学习模型来识别功能磁共振成像（fMRI）中的功能脑网络（FBN）最近引起了越来越多的兴趣。然而，大多数现有工作侧重于从整个功能磁共振成像信号中检测静态 FBN，例如基于相关性的功能连接。滑动窗口是一种广泛使用的捕获 FBN 动态的策略，但它在表示每个时间步的内在功能交互动态方面仍然受到限制。并且FBN的数量通常需要手动设置。此外，由于大脑中动态交互的复杂性，传统的线性和浅层模型不足以识别每个时间步长的复杂且空间重叠的 FBN。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的空间和通道注意力自动编码器（SCAAE），用于动态发现 FBN。 SCAAE的核心思想是将注意力机制应用于FBN的构建中。具体来说，我们设计了两个注意力模块：1）空间注意力（SA）模块，用于发现空间域中的FBN；2）通道注意力（CA）模块，用于权衡通道以自动选择FBN。我们在 ADHD200 数据集上评估了我们的方法，结果表明所提出的 SCAAE 方法可以有效地恢复每个 fMRI 时间步长的 FBN 的动态变化，而无需使用滑动窗口。更重要的是，我们提出的混合注意力模块（SA和CA）不像以前的方法那样强制执行线性和独立性的假设，从而提供了一种更好地理解动态功能大脑网络的新方法。 本文提出一种基于空间与通道注意力机制的自编码器（SCAAE），用于动态发现功能脑网络（FBNs），无需滑动窗口即可捕捉fMRI时间步长的动态变化。 Yiheng Liu,Enjie Ge,Mengshen He,Zhengliang Liu,Shijie Zhao,Xintao Hu,Dajiang Zhu,Tianming Liu,Bao Ge cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.IV,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Yacine Izza,Alexey Ignatiev,Nina Narodytska,Martin C. Cooper,Joao Marques-Silva
title: Provably Precise, Succinct and Efficient Explanations for Decision Trees
title_zh: 对决策树的可证明精确、简洁和高效的解释
abstract: Decision trees (DTs) embody interpretable classifiers. DTs have been advocated for deployment in high-risk applications, but also for explaining other complex classifiers. Nevertheless, recent work has demonstrated that predictions in DTs ought to be explained with rigorous approaches. Although rigorous explanations can be computed in polynomial time for DTs, their size may be beyond the cognitive limits of human decision makers. This paper investigates the computation of δ-relevant sets for DTs. δ-relevant sets denote explanations that are succinct and provably precise. These sets represent generalizations of rigorous explanations, which are precise with probability one, and so they enable trading off explanation size for precision. The paper proposes two logic encodings for computing smallest δ-relevant sets for DTs. The paper further devises a polynomial-time algorithm for computing δ-relevant sets which are not guaranteed to be subset-minimal, but for which the experiments show to be most often subset-minimal in practice. The experimental results also demonstrate the practical efficiency of computing smallest δ-relevant sets.
summary: Decision trees (DTs) embody interpretable classifiers. DTs have been advocated for deployment in high-risk applications, but also for explaining other complex classifiers. Nevertheless, recent work has demonstrated that predictions in DTs ought to be explained with rigorous approaches. Although rigorous explanations can be computed in polynomial time for DTs, their size may be beyond the cognitive limits of human decision makers. This paper investigates the computation of δ-relevant sets for DTs. δ-relevant sets denote explanations that are succinct and provably precise. These sets represent generalizations of rigorous explanations, which are precise with probability one, and so they enable trading off explanation size for precision. The paper proposes two logic encodings for computing smallest δ-relevant sets for DTs. The paper further devises a polynomial-time algorithm for computing δ-relevant sets which are not guaranteed to be subset-minimal, but for which the experiments show to be most often subset-minimal in practice. The experimental results also demonstrate the practical efficiency of computing smallest δ-relevant sets.
abstract_zh: 决策树 (DT) 包含可解释的分类器。 DT 已被提倡在高风险应用程序中部署，但也用于解释其他复杂的分类器。然而，最近的工作表明，DT 中的预测应该用严格的方法来解释。尽管可以在多项式时间内计算出 DT 的严格解释，但它们的大小可能超出了人类决策者的认知极限。本文研究了 DT 的 δ 相关集的计算。 δ 相关集表示简洁且可证明精确的解释。这些集合代表了严格解释的概括，其精确度为一，因此它们可以在解释大小和精度之间进行权衡。该论文提出了两种逻辑编码来计算 DT 的最小 δ 相关集。本文进一步设计了一种用于计算 δ 相关集的多项式时间算法，该算法不能保证是子集最小，但实验表明在实践中最常是子集最小。实验结果还证明了计算最小 δ 相关集的实际效率。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何为决策树生成既精确又简洁的解释方法，提出δ-相关集的概念并设计算法实现。
AI.motivation: 决策树虽具可解释性，但现有严谨解释可能过于冗长，难以被人类理解，需在解释精度与简洁性间取得平衡。
AI.method: 提出两种逻辑编码计算最小δ-相关集，并设计多项式时间算法，实际中常能获得子集极小解。
AI.result: 实验验证了算法在计算最小δ-相关集时的高效性与实用性，证明其在精度与简洁性上的平衡能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为决策树解释提供了兼顾精确性与简洁性的有效方案，适用于高风险场景的可解释AI需求。

title: Automatic Spoken Language Identification using a Time-Delay Neural Network
title_zh: 使用时延神经网络的自动口语识别
comment: 6 pages, 6 figures, Technical Report Recognition Technologies, Inc
comments: 6 pages, 6 figures, Technical Report Recognition Technologies, Inc
abstract: Closed-set spoken language identification is the task of recognizing the language being spoken in a recorded audio clip from a set of known languages. In this study, a language identification system was built and trained to distinguish between Arabic, Spanish, French, and Turkish based on nothing more than recorded speech. A pre-existing multilingual dataset was used to train a series of acoustic models based on the Tedlium TDNN model to perform automatic speech recognition. The system was provided with a custom multilingual language model and a specialized pronunciation lexicon with language names prepended to phones. The trained model was used to generate phone alignments to test data from all four languages, and languages were predicted based on a voting scheme choosing the most common language prepend in an utterance. Accuracy was measured by comparing predicted languages to known languages, and was determined to be very high in identifying Spanish and Arabic, and somewhat lower in identifying Turkish and French.
summary: Closed-set spoken language identification is the task of recognizing the language being spoken in a recorded audio clip from a set of known languages. In this study, a language identification system was built and trained to distinguish between Arabic, Spanish, French, and Turkish based on nothing more than recorded speech. A pre-existing multilingual dataset was used to train a series of acoustic models based on the Tedlium TDNN model to perform automatic speech recognition. The system was provided with a custom multilingual language model and a specialized pronunciation lexicon with language names prepended to phones. The trained model was used to generate phone alignments to test data from all four languages, and languages were predicted based on a voting scheme choosing the most common language prepend in an utterance. Accuracy was measured by comparing predicted languages to known languages, and was determined to be very high in identifying Spanish and Arabic, and somewhat lower in identifying Turkish and French.
abstract_zh: 封闭集口语识别是从一组已知语言中识别录制的音频片段中所说的语言的任务。在这项研究中，建立并训练了一个语言识别系统，仅根据录制的语音来区分阿拉伯语、西班牙语、法语和土耳其语。使用预先存在的多语言数据集来训练一系列基于 Tedlium TDNN 模型的声学模型，以执行自动语音识别。该系统提供了一个自定义的多语言语言模型和一个专门的发音词典，其中语言名称前缀在电话上。训练后的模型用于生成音素对齐以测试所有四种语言的数据，并根据选择话语中最常见语言前缀的投票方案来预测语言。通过将预测语言与已知语言进行比较来衡量准确性，并确定在识别西班牙语和阿拉伯语方面非常高，而在识别土耳其语和法语方面则稍低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时间延迟神经网络（TDNN）的自动语音语言识别系统，用于区分阿拉伯语、西班牙语、法语和土耳其语。
AI.motivation: 开发一种无需文本信息、仅通过语音信号即可准确识别多种语言的系统，以支持多语言语音处理应用。
AI.method: 使用多语言数据集训练基于Tedlium TDNN的声学模型，结合自定义语言模型和带语言前缀的发音词典，通过生成音素对齐并采用投票机制预测语言。
AI.result: 系统在西班牙语和阿拉伯语识别上准确率很高，对土耳其语和法语的识别准确率相对较低。
AI.conclusion: TDNN方法在多语言语音识别中表现有效，但需进一步优化以提升对部分语言的识别能力。

title: Hybrid Intelligent Testing in Simulation-Based Verification
title_zh: 基于仿真的验证中的混合智能测试
comment: ef:2022 IEEE International Conference On Artificial Intelligence Testing (AITest), 2022, pp. 26-33
comments: ef:2022 IEEE International Conference On Artificial Intelligence Testing (AITest), 2022, pp. 26-33
abstract: Efficient and effective testing for simulation-based hardware verification is challenging. Using constrained random test generation, several millions of tests may be required to achieve coverage goals. The vast majority of tests do not contribute to coverage progress, yet they consume verification resources. In this paper, we propose a hybrid intelligent testing approach combining two methods that have previously been treated separately, namely Coverage-Directed Test Selection and Novelty-Driven Verification. Coverage-Directed Test Selection learns from coverage feedback to bias testing toward the most effective tests. Novelty-Driven Verification learns to identify and simulate stimuli that differ from previous stimuli, thereby reducing the number of simulations and increasing testing efficiency. We discuss the strengths and limitations of each method, and we show how our approach addresses each method's limitations, leading to hardware testing that is both efficient and effective.
summary: Efficient and effective testing for simulation-based hardware verification is challenging. Using constrained random test generation, several millions of tests may be required to achieve coverage goals. The vast majority of tests do not contribute to coverage progress, yet they consume verification resources. In this paper, we propose a hybrid intelligent testing approach combining two methods that have previously been treated separately, namely Coverage-Directed Test Selection and Novelty-Driven Verification. Coverage-Directed Test Selection learns from coverage feedback to bias testing toward the most effective tests. Novelty-Driven Verification learns to identify and simulate stimuli that differ from previous stimuli, thereby reducing the number of simulations and increasing testing efficiency. We discuss the strengths and limitations of each method, and we show how our approach addresses each method's limitations, leading to hardware testing that is both efficient and effective.
abstract_zh: 基于仿真的硬件验证的高效且有效的测试具有挑战性。使用约束随机测试生成，可能需要数百万次测试才能实现覆盖目标。绝大多数测试不会对覆盖进度做出贡献，但会消耗验证资源。在本文中，我们提出了一种混合智能测试方法，结合了以前单独处理的两种方法，即覆盖范围导向的测试选择和新颖性驱动的验证。覆盖率导向的测试选择从覆盖率反馈中学习，以偏向测试以实现最有效的测试。新颖性驱动验证学习识别和模拟与先前刺激不同的刺激，从而减少模拟次数并提高测试效率。我们讨论了每种方法的优点和局限性，并展示了我们的方法如何解决每种方法的局限性，从而实现高效且有效的硬件测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合智能测试方法，结合覆盖率导向测试选择与新颖性驱动验证，以提升仿真验证的效率和效果。
AI.motivation: 传统约束随机测试生成需消耗大量资源却难以有效提升覆盖率，亟需更高效的测试方法。
AI.method: 融合两种独立方法：通过覆盖率反馈优化测试选择，同时通过识别新颖刺激减少冗余仿真。
AI.result: 混合方法克服了单一技术的局限，显著提升硬件测试效率并达成覆盖率目标。
AI.conclusion: 该混合智能测试框架为硬件验证提供了高效且有效的解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Hybrid Intelligent Testing in Simulation-Based Verification 基于仿真的验证中的混合智能测试 Efficient and effective testing for simulation-based hardware verification is challenging. Using constrained random test generation, several millions of tests may be required to achieve coverage goals. The vast majority of tests do not contribute to coverage progress, yet they consume verification resources. In this paper, we propose a hybrid intelligent testing approach combining two methods that have previously been treated separately, namely Coverage-Directed Test Selection and Novelty-Driven Verification. Coverage-Directed Test Selection learns from coverage feedback to bias testing toward the most effective tests. Novelty-Driven Verification learns to identify and simulate stimuli that differ from previous stimuli, thereby reducing the number of simulations and increasing testing efficiency. We discuss the strengths and limitations of each method, and we show how our approach addresses each method's limitations, leading to hardware testing that is both efficient and effective. 基于仿真的硬件验证的高效且有效的测试具有挑战性。使用约束随机测试生成，可能需要数百万次测试才能实现覆盖目标。绝大多数测试不会对覆盖进度做出贡献，但会消耗验证资源。在本文中，我们提出了一种混合智能测试方法，结合了以前单独处理的两种方法，即覆盖范围导向的测试选择和新颖性驱动的验证。覆盖率导向的测试选择从覆盖率反馈中学习，以偏向测试以实现最有效的测试。新颖性驱动验证学习识别和模拟与先前刺激不同的刺激，从而减少模拟次数并提高测试效率。我们讨论了每种方法的优点和局限性，并展示了我们的方法如何解决每种方法的局限性，从而实现高效且有效的硬件测试。 本文提出一种混合智能测试方法，结合覆盖率导向测试选择与新颖性驱动验证，以提升仿真验证的效率和效果。 Nyasha Masamba,Kerstin Eder,Tim Blackmore cs.AR,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.SE

title: Politeness Counts: Perceptions of Peacekeeping Robots
title_zh: 礼貌很重要：对维和机器人的看法
abstract: The 'intuitive' trust people feel when encountering robots in public spaces is a key determinant of their willingness to cooperate with these robots. We conducted four experiments to study this topic in the context of peacekeeping robots. Participants viewed scenarios, presented as static images or animations, involving a robot or a human guard performing an access-control task. The guards interacted more or less politely with younger and older male and female people. Our results show strong effects of the guard's politeness. Age and sex of the people interacting with the guard had no significant effect on participants' impressions of its attributes. There were no differences between responses to robot and human guards. This study advances the notion that politeness is a crucial determinant of people's perception of peacekeeping robots.
summary: The 'intuitive' trust people feel when encountering robots in public spaces is a key determinant of their willingness to cooperate with these robots. We conducted four experiments to study this topic in the context of peacekeeping robots. Participants viewed scenarios, presented as static images or animations, involving a robot or a human guard performing an access-control task. The guards interacted more or less politely with younger and older male and female people. Our results show strong effects of the guard's politeness. Age and sex of the people interacting with the guard had no significant effect on participants' impressions of its attributes. There were no differences between responses to robot and human guards. This study advances the notion that politeness is a crucial determinant of people's perception of peacekeeping robots.
abstract_zh: 人们在公共场所遇到机器人时感受到的“直觉”信任是他们愿意与这些机器人合作的关键决定因素。我们进行了四项实验，在维和机器人的背景下研究这个主题。参与者观看以静态图像或动画形式呈现的场景，其中涉及机器人或人类警卫执行访问控制任务。警卫们或多或少有礼貌地与年轻和年长的男女交往。我们的结果显示了警卫礼貌的强烈影响。与守卫互动的人的年龄和性别对参与者对其属性的印象没有显着影响。对机器人和人类警卫的反应没有差异。这项研究提出了这样的观点：礼貌是人们对维和机器人看法的关键决定因素。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了礼貌程度对人们对和平维持机器人感知的影响，通过实验分析机器人与人类警卫在门禁任务中的表现差异。
AI.motivation: 现有研究关注机器人信任度，但缺乏对礼貌等交互细节如何影响公众接受度的系统探讨，需明确礼貌在人机协作中的关键作用。
AI.method: 通过四组实验，让参与者观看机器人或人类警卫执行门禁任务的静态图像/动画，观察不同礼貌程度交互下参与者对警卫属性的评价差异。
AI.result: 警卫的礼貌程度显著影响参与者信任感，而互动对象的年龄、性别及警卫类型（机器人/人类）均未产生显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 礼貌是决定公众对和平维持机器人接受度的核心因素，为设计人机交互系统提供了关键行为准则。

authors_text: Takashi Urushibara,Nicolas Chauvet,Satoshi Kochi,Satoshi Sunada,Kazutaka Kanno,Atsushi Uchida,Ryoichi Horisaki,Makoto Naruse
title: Parallel bandit architecture based on laser chaos for reinforcement learning
title_zh: 基于激光混沌的强化学习并行老虎机架构
abstract: Accelerating artificial intelligence by photonics is an active field of study aiming to exploit the unique properties of photons. Reinforcement learning is an important branch of machine learning, and photonic decision-making principles have been demonstrated with respect to the multi-armed bandit problems. However, reinforcement learning could involve a massive number of states, unlike previously demonstrated bandit problems where the number of states is only one. Q-learning is a well-known approach in reinforcement learning that can deal with many states. The architecture of Q-learning, however, does not fit well photonic implementations due to its separation of update rule and the action selection. In this study, we organize a new architecture for multi-state reinforcement learning as a parallel array of bandit problems in order to benefit from photonic decision-makers, which we call parallel bandit architecture for reinforcement learning or PBRL in short. Taking a cart-pole balancing problem as an instance, we demonstrate that PBRL adapts to the environment in fewer time steps than Q-learning. Furthermore, PBRL yields faster adaptation when operated with a chaotic laser time series than the case with uniformly distributed pseudorandom numbers where the autocorrelation inherent in the laser chaos provides a positive effect. We also find that the variety of states that the system undergoes during the learning phase exhibits completely different properties between PBRL and Q-learning. The insights obtained through the present study are also beneficial for existing computing platforms, not just photonic realizations, in accelerating performances by the PBRL algorithms and correlated random sequences.
summary: Accelerating artificial intelligence by photonics is an active field of study aiming to exploit the unique properties of photons. Reinforcement learning is an important branch of machine learning, and photonic decision-making principles have been demonstrated with respect to the multi-armed bandit problems. However, reinforcement learning could involve a massive number of states, unlike previously demonstrated bandit problems where the number of states is only one. Q-learning is a well-known approach in reinforcement learning that can deal with many states. The architecture of Q-learning, however, does not fit well photonic implementations due to its separation of update rule and the action selection. In this study, we organize a new architecture for multi-state reinforcement learning as a parallel array of bandit problems in order to benefit from photonic decision-makers, which we call parallel bandit architecture for reinforcement learning or PBRL in short. Taking a cart-pole balancing problem as an instance, we demonstrate that PBRL adapts to the environment in fewer time steps than Q-learning. Furthermore, PBRL yields faster adaptation when operated with a chaotic laser time series than the case with uniformly distributed pseudorandom numbers where the autocorrelation inherent in the laser chaos provides a positive effect. We also find that the variety of states that the system undergoes during the learning phase exhibits completely different properties between PBRL and Q-learning. The insights obtained through the present study are also beneficial for existing computing platforms, not just photonic realizations, in accelerating performances by the PBRL algorithms and correlated random sequences.
abstract_zh: 通过光子学加速人工智能是一个活跃的研究领域，旨在利用光子的独特特性。强化学习是机器学习的一个重要分支，光子决策原理已经针对多臂老虎机问题得到了证明。然而，强化学习可能涉及大量状态，这与之前演示的状态数量只有一个的强盗问题不同。 Q-learning 是强化学习中一种众所周知的方法，可以处理多种状态。然而，Q-learning 的架构由于更新规则和动作选择的分离而不太适合光子实现。在这项研究中，我们组织了一种新的多状态强化学习架构作为老虎机问题的并行阵列，以便从光子决策者中受益，我们将其称为强化学习的并行老虎机架构或简称 PBRL。以车杆平衡问题为例，我们证明了 PBRL 比 Q-learning 能够以更少的时间步数来适应环境。此外，当使用混沌激光时间序列操作时，PBRL 比使用均匀分布的伪随机数的情况产生更快的适应，在均匀分布的伪随机数中，激光混沌中固有的自相关性提供了积极的效果。我们还发现，系统在学习阶段经历的各种状态在 PBRL 和 Q 学习之间表现出完全不同的属性。通过本研究获得的见解对于现有计算平台（而不仅仅是光子实现）在加速 PBRL 算法和相关随机序列的性能方面也有益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于激光混沌的并行老虎机架构（PBRL），用于改进强化学习的决策效率。
AI.motivation: 传统Q学习算法因结构限制难以适配光子系统，而光子学的高速特性可提升强化学习性能，需设计适合光子实现的新型架构。
AI.method: 构建多状态强化学习的并行老虎机架构（PBRL），利用激光混沌时间序列替代伪随机数，通过Cart-Pole平衡问题验证其性能。
AI.result: PBRL在激光混沌驱动下比Q学习更快适应环境，且学习过程中状态分布特性存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: PBRL算法通过利用混沌序列相关性，可加速强化学习过程，该方法对光子计算及其他计算平台均具普适价值。
