title: Image Augmentation Based Momentum Memory Intrinsic Reward for Sparse Reward Visual Scenes
title_zh: 基于图像增强的稀疏奖励视觉场景的动量记忆内在奖励
abstract: Many scenes in real life can be abstracted to the sparse reward visual scenes, where it is difficult for an agent to tackle the task under the condition of only accepting images and sparse rewards. We propose to decompose this problem into two sub-problems: the visual representation and the sparse reward. To address them, a novel framework IAMMIR combining the self-supervised representation learning with the intrinsic motivation is presented. For visual representation, a representation driven by a combination of the imageaugmented forward dynamics and the reward is acquired. For sparse rewards, a new type of intrinsic reward is designed, the Momentum Memory Intrinsic Reward (MMIR). It utilizes the difference of the outputs from the current model (online network) and the historical model (target network) to present the agent's state familiarity. Our method is evaluated on the visual navigation task with sparse rewards in Vizdoom. Experiments demonstrate that our method achieves the state of the art performance in sample efficiency, at least 2 times faster than the existing methods reaching 100% success rate.
summary: Many scenes in real life can be abstracted to the sparse reward visual scenes, where it is difficult for an agent to tackle the task under the condition of only accepting images and sparse rewards. We propose to decompose this problem into two sub-problems: the visual representation and the sparse reward. To address them, a novel framework IAMMIR combining the self-supervised representation learning with the intrinsic motivation is presented. For visual representation, a representation driven by a combination of the imageaugmented forward dynamics and the reward is acquired. For sparse rewards, a new type of intrinsic reward is designed, the Momentum Memory Intrinsic Reward (MMIR). It utilizes the difference of the outputs from the current model (online network) and the historical model (target network) to present the agent's state familiarity. Our method is evaluated on the visual navigation task with sparse rewards in Vizdoom. Experiments demonstrate that our method achieves the state of the art performance in sample efficiency, at least 2 times faster than the existing methods reaching 100% success rate.
abstract_zh: 现实生活中的许多场景都可以抽象为稀疏奖励视觉场景，在这种情况下，智能体很难在仅接受图像和稀疏奖励的情况下完成任务。我们建议将该问题分解为两个子问题：视觉表示和稀疏奖励。为了解决这些问题，提出了一种将自监督表示学习与内在动机相结合的新颖框架 IAMMIR。对于视觉表示，获取由图像增强的前向动态和奖励的组合驱动的表示。对于稀疏奖励，设计了一种新型的内在奖励，即动量记忆内在奖励（MMIR）。它利用当前模型（在线网络）和历史模型（目标网络）的输出差异来呈现代理的状态熟悉度。我们的方法在 Vizdoom 中具有稀疏奖励的视觉导航任务上进行了评估。实验表明，我们的方法在样本效率方面达到了最先进的性能，比现有方法至少快 2 倍，达到 100% 的成功率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合自监督表示学习与内在动机的框架IAMMIR，用于解决稀疏奖励视觉场景下的智能体任务难题。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中稀疏奖励导致智能体难以通过传统方法学习有效策略，需同时解决视觉表征学习与稀疏奖励机制设计问题。
AI.method: 通过图像增强前向动力学与奖励驱动的视觉表征学习，设计基于动量记忆的内在奖励机制（MMIR），利用在线网络与目标网络输出差异衡量状态熟悉度。
AI.result: 在Vizdoom视觉导航任务中，该方法样本效率达最先进水平，较现有方法提速2倍以上，成功率达100%。
AI.conclusion: IAMMIR框架通过融合自监督表征学习与动量记忆内在奖励机制，有效解决了稀疏奖励视觉场景下的智能体学习效率问题。

title: Cross-Enhancement Transformer for Action Segmentation
title_zh: 用于动作分段的交叉增强变压器
abstract: Temporal convolutions have been the paradigm of choice in action segmentation, which enhances long-term receptive fields by increasing convolution layers. However, high layers cause the loss of local information necessary for frame recognition. To solve the above problem, a novel encoder-decoder structure is proposed in this paper, called Cross-Enhancement Transformer. Our approach can be effective learning of temporal structure representation with interactive self-attention mechanism. Concatenated each layer convolutional feature maps in encoder with a set of features in decoder produced via self-attention. Therefore, local and global information are used in a series of frame actions simultaneously. In addition, a new loss function is proposed to enhance the training process that penalizes over-segmentation errors. Experiments show that our framework performs state-of-the-art on three challenging datasets: 50Salads, Georgia Tech Egocentric Activities and the Breakfast dataset.
summary: Temporal convolutions have been the paradigm of choice in action segmentation, which enhances long-term receptive fields by increasing convolution layers. However, high layers cause the loss of local information necessary for frame recognition. To solve the above problem, a novel encoder-decoder structure is proposed in this paper, called Cross-Enhancement Transformer. Our approach can be effective learning of temporal structure representation with interactive self-attention mechanism. Concatenated each layer convolutional feature maps in encoder with a set of features in decoder produced via self-attention. Therefore, local and global information are used in a series of frame actions simultaneously. In addition, a new loss function is proposed to enhance the training process that penalizes over-segmentation errors. Experiments show that our framework performs state-of-the-art on three challenging datasets: 50Salads, Georgia Tech Egocentric Activities and the Breakfast dataset.
abstract_zh: 时间卷积一直是动作分割的选择范式，它通过增加卷积层来增强长期感受野。然而，高层会导致帧识别所需的局部信息丢失。为了解决上述问题，本文提出了一种新颖的编码器-解码器结构，称为交叉增强变压器。我们的方法可以通过交互式自注意力机制有效学习时间结构表示。将编码器中的每层卷积特征图与解码器中通过自注意力生成的一组特征连接起来。因此，局部和全局信息同时用于一系列帧动作。此外，还提出了一种新的损失函数来增强惩罚过度分割错误的训练过程。实验表明，我们的框架在三个具有挑战性的数据集上表现出了最先进的性能：50Salads、佐治亚理工学院的自我中心活动和早餐数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Cross-Enhancement Transformer的编码器-解码器结构，用于改进动作分割任务中的时空信息建模。
AI.motivation: 传统时间卷积在动作分割中因堆叠层数过多导致局部信息丢失，难以平衡局部细节与全局时序关系。
AI.method: 通过编码器卷积特征与解码器自注意力机制生成的特征拼接，同时利用局部与全局信息；设计新损失函数抑制过度分割误差。
AI.result: 在50Salads、Georgia Tech Egocentric Activities和Breakfast三个数据集上达到当时最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 交叉增强机制有效融合时空特征，结合改进损失函数显著提升了动作分割的准确性与鲁棒性。

search_text: Cross-Enhancement Transformer for Action Segmentation 用于动作分段的交叉增强变压器 Temporal convolutions have been the paradigm of choice in action segmentation, which enhances long-term receptive fields by increasing convolution layers. However, high layers cause the loss of local information necessary for frame recognition. To solve the above problem, a novel encoder-decoder structure is proposed in this paper, called Cross-Enhancement Transformer. Our approach can be effective learning of temporal structure representation with interactive self-attention mechanism. Concatenated each layer convolutional feature maps in encoder with a set of features in decoder produced via self-attention. Therefore, local and global information are used in a series of frame actions simultaneously. In addition, a new loss function is proposed to enhance the training process that penalizes over-segmentation errors. Experiments show that our framework performs state-of-the-art on three challenging datasets: 50Salads, Georgia Tech Egocentric Activities and the Breakfast dataset. 时间卷积一直是动作分割的选择范式，它通过增加卷积层来增强长期感受野。然而，高层会导致帧识别所需的局部信息丢失。为了解决上述问题，本文提出了一种新颖的编码器-解码器结构，称为交叉增强变压器。我们的方法可以通过交互式自注意力机制有效学习时间结构表示。将编码器中的每层卷积特征图与解码器中通过自注意力生成的一组特征连接起来。因此，局部和全局信息同时用于一系列帧动作。此外，还提出了一种新的损失函数来增强惩罚过度分割错误的训练过程。实验表明，我们的框架在三个具有挑战性的数据集上表现出了最先进的性能：50Salads、佐治亚理工学院的自我中心活动和早餐数据集。 本文提出一种名为Cross-Enhancement Transformer的编码器-解码器结构，用于改进动作分割任务中的时空信息建模。 Jiahui Wang,Zhenyou Wang,Shanna Zhuang,Hui Wang cs.CV

title: PYSKL: Towards Good Practices for Skeleton Action Recognition
title_zh: PYSKL：迈向骨骼动作识别的良好实践
abstract: We present PYSKL: an open-source toolbox for skeleton-based action recognition based on PyTorch. The toolbox supports a wide variety of skeleton action recognition algorithms, including approaches based on GCN and CNN. In contrast to existing open-source skeleton action recognition projects that include only one or two algorithms, PYSKL implements six different algorithms under a unified framework with both the latest and original good practices to ease the comparison of efficacy and efficiency. We also provide an original GCN-based skeleton action recognition model named ST-GCN++, which achieves competitive recognition performance without any complicated attention schemes, serving as a strong baseline. Meanwhile, PYSKL supports the training and testing of nine skeleton-based action recognition benchmarks and achieves state-of-the-art recognition performance on eight of them. To facilitate future research on skeleton action recognition, we also provide a large number of trained models and detailed benchmark results to give some insights. PYSKL is released at https://github.com/kennymckormick/pyskl and is actively maintained. We will update this report when we add new features or benchmarks. The current version corresponds to PYSKL v0.2.
summary: We present PYSKL: an open-source toolbox for skeleton-based action recognition based on PyTorch. The toolbox supports a wide variety of skeleton action recognition algorithms, including approaches based on GCN and CNN. In contrast to existing open-source skeleton action recognition projects that include only one or two algorithms, PYSKL implements six different algorithms under a unified framework with both the latest and original good practices to ease the comparison of efficacy and efficiency. We also provide an original GCN-based skeleton action recognition model named ST-GCN++, which achieves competitive recognition performance without any complicated attention schemes, serving as a strong baseline. Meanwhile, PYSKL supports the training and testing of nine skeleton-based action recognition benchmarks and achieves state-of-the-art recognition performance on eight of them. To facilitate future research on skeleton action recognition, we also provide a large number of trained models and detailed benchmark results to give some insights. PYSKL is released at https://github.com/kennymckormick/pyskl and is actively maintained. We will update this report when we add new features or benchmarks. The current version corresponds to PYSKL v0.2.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍 PYSKL：一个基于 PyTorch 的基于骨架的动作识别的开源工具箱。该工具箱支持多种骨架动作识别算法，包括基于 GCN 和 CNN 的方法。与现有仅包含一两种算法的开源骨骼动作识别项目相比，PYSKL 在统一框架下实现了六种不同的算法，并结合了最新和原创的良好实践，以便于功效和效率的比较。我们还提供了一个原始的基于 GCN 的骨架动作识别模型 ST-GCN++，它在没有任何复杂的注意力方案的情况下实现了有竞争力的识别性能，作为强大的基线。同时，PYSKL 支持九个基于骨架的动作识别基准的训练和测试，并在其中八个上实现了最先进的识别性能。为了方便未来对骨架动作识别的研究，我们还提供了大量的训练模型和详细的基准测试结果来提供一些见解。 PYSKL 发布于 https://github.com/kennymckormick/pyskl 并得到积极维护。当我们添加新功能或基准时，我们将更新此报告。当前版本对应于 PYSKL v0.2。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个基于PyTorch的开源工具箱PYSKL，用于骨骼动作识别，支持多种算法并提供基准测试。
AI.motivation: 现有开源项目仅包含一两个算法，难以比较效果与效率，需统一框架支持多种方法并提供最佳实践。
AI.method: 实现六种算法（包括GCN和CNN）的统一框架，提出新模型ST-GCN++，支持九个基准测试并提供预训练模型。
AI.result: 在八个基准测试中达到SOTA性能，提供详细结果和模型以辅助未来研究。
AI.conclusion: PYSKL为骨骼动作识别研究提供全面工具和资源，持续维护更新以促进领域发展。

title: Oracle-MNIST: a Dataset of Oracle Characters for Benchmarking Machine Learning Algorithms
title_zh: Oracle-MNIST：用于机器学习算法基准测试的 Oracle 字符数据集
abstract: We introduce the Oracle-MNIST dataset, comprising of 28$\times $28 grayscale images of 30,222 ancient characters from 10 categories, for benchmarking pattern classification, with particular challenges on image noise and distortion. The training set totally consists of 27,222 images, and the test set contains 300 images per class. Oracle-MNIST shares the same data format with the original MNIST dataset, allowing for direct compatibility with all existing classifiers and systems, but it constitutes a more challenging classification task than MNIST. The images of ancient characters suffer from 1) extremely serious and unique noises caused by three-thousand years of burial and aging and 2) dramatically variant writing styles by ancient Chinese, which all make them realistic for machine learning research. The dataset is freely available at https://github.com/wm-bupt/oracle-mnist.
summary: We introduce the Oracle-MNIST dataset, comprising of 28$\times $28 grayscale images of 30,222 ancient characters from 10 categories, for benchmarking pattern classification, with particular challenges on image noise and distortion. The training set totally consists of 27,222 images, and the test set contains 300 images per class. Oracle-MNIST shares the same data format with the original MNIST dataset, allowing for direct compatibility with all existing classifiers and systems, but it constitutes a more challenging classification task than MNIST. The images of ancient characters suffer from 1) extremely serious and unique noises caused by three-thousand years of burial and aging and 2) dramatically variant writing styles by ancient Chinese, which all make them realistic for machine learning research. The dataset is freely available at https://github.com/wm-bupt/oracle-mnist.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 Oracle-MNIST 数据集，其中包含来自 10 个类别的 30,222 个古代字符的 28$\times $28 灰度图像，用于基准模式分类，特别是图像噪声和失真方面的挑战。训练集总共包含 27,222 张图像，测试集每类包含 300 张图像。 Oracle-MNIST 与原始 MNIST 数据集共享相同的数据格式，允许与所有现有的分类器和系统直接兼容，但它构成了比 MNIST 更具挑战性的分类任务。古代文字的图像受到以下影响：1）三千年的埋葬和老化造成的极其严重和独特的噪音；2）古代汉字的书写风格差异很大，这些都使得它们对于机器学习研究来说是现实的。该数据集可在 https://github.com/wm-bupt/oracle-mnist 免费获取。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为Oracle-MNIST的数据集，包含30,222张28×28灰度古文字图像，用于基准测试机器学习算法的模式分类任务。
AI.motivation: 为提供比MNIST更具挑战性的分类任务，解决古代字符图像因年代久远导致的严重噪声和书写风格多样性问题。
AI.method: 收集30,222张古代字符图像，分为10类，采用与MNIST相同的数据格式，包含训练集27,222张和每类300张的测试集。
AI.result: 构建了一个兼容现有分类器且可公开获取的数据集，图像包含埋藏噪声和风格变异，适合机器学习研究。
AI.conclusion: Oracle-MNIST为模式分类算法提供了更具现实挑战性的基准测试平台，推动鲁棒性研究。

Oracle-MNIST shares the same data format with the original MNIST dataset, allowing for direct compatibility with all existing classifiers and systems, but it constitutes a more challenging classification task than MNIST. The images of ancient characters suffer from 1) extremely serious and unique noises caused by three-thousand years of burial and aging and 2) dramatically variant writing styles by ancient Chinese, which all make them realistic for machine learning research. The dataset is freely available at https://github.com/wm-bupt/oracle-mnist. 我们引入了 Oracle-MNIST 数据集，其中包含来自 10 个类别的 30,222 个古代字符的 28$\times $28 灰度图像，用于基准模式分类，特别是图像噪声和失真方面的挑战。训练集总共包含 27,222 张图像，测试集每类包含 300 张图像。 Oracle-MNIST 与原始 MNIST 数据集共享相同的数据格式，允许与所有现有的分类器和系统直接兼容，但它构成了比 MNIST 更具挑战性的分类任务。古代文字的图像受到以下影响：1）三千年的埋葬和老化造成的极其严重和独特的噪音；2）古代汉字的书写风格差异很大，这些都使得它们对于机器学习研究来说是现实的。该数据集可在 https://github.com/wm-bupt/oracle-mnist 免费获取。 本文介绍了一个名为Oracle-MNIST的数据集，包含30,222张28×28灰度古文字图像，用于基准测试机器学习算法的模式分类任务。 Mei Wang,Weihong Deng cs.CV

authors_text: David S. Watson,Kristin Blesch,Jan Kapar,Marvin N. Wright
title: Adversarial random forests for density estimation and generative modeling
title_zh: 用于密度估计和生成建模的对抗随机森林
abstract: We propose methods for density estimation and data synthesis using a novel form of unsupervised random forests. Inspired by generative adversarial networks, we implement a recursive procedure in which trees gradually learn structural properties of the data through alternating rounds of generation and discrimination. The method is provably consistent under minimal assumptions. Unlike classic tree-based alternatives, our approach provides smooth (un)conditional densities and allows for fully synthetic data generation. We achieve comparable or superior performance to state-of-the-art probabilistic circuits and deep learning models on various tabular data benchmarks while executing about two orders of magnitude faster on average. An accompanying $\texttt{R}$ package, $\texttt{arf}$, is available on $\texttt{CRAN}$.
summary: We propose methods for density estimation and data synthesis using a novel form of unsupervised random forests. Inspired by generative adversarial networks, we implement a recursive procedure in which trees gradually learn structural properties of the data through alternating rounds of generation and discrimination. The method is provably consistent under minimal assumptions. Unlike classic tree-based alternatives, our approach provides smooth (un)conditional densities and allows for fully synthetic data generation. We achieve comparable or superior performance to state-of-the-art probabilistic circuits and deep learning models on various tabular data benchmarks while executing about two orders of magnitude faster on average. An accompanying $\texttt{R}$ package, $\texttt{arf}$, is available on $\texttt{CRAN}$.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了使用新型形式的无监督随机森林进行密度估计和数据合成的方法。受生成对抗网络的启发，我们实现了一个递归过程，其中树通过交替的生成和辨别轮次逐渐学习数据的结构特性。该方法在最小假设下可证明是一致的。与经典的基于树的替代方案不同，我们的方法提供平滑（无）条件密度，并允许完全合成的数据生成。我们在各种表格数据基准上实现了与最先进的概率电路和深度学习模型相当或更好的性能，同时平均执行速度提高了大约两个数量级。随附的 $\texttt{R}$ 软件包 $\texttt{arf}$ 可在 $\texttt{CRAN}$ 上获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于对抗随机森林的方法，用于密度估计和生成建模。
AI.motivation: 传统树模型难以生成连续密度，且现有生成模型复杂度高，需更高效方法。
AI.method: 受生成对抗网络启发，采用生成与判别交替的递归过程，使树逐步学习数据结构，实现平滑条件密度估计和全合成数据生成。
AI.result: 在多个表格数据基准测试中，性能与先进概率电路和深度学习模型相当或更优，且平均速度快约两个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在理论上一致，计算高效，适用于需要快速生成高质量合成数据的场景。

authors_text: Simo Alami. C,Fernando Llorente,Rim Kaddah,Luca Martino,Jesse Read
title: CAMEO: Curiosity Augmented Metropolis for Exploratory Optimal Policies
title_zh: CAMEO：好奇心增强大都市探索性最优政策
comment: 2022 30th European Signal Processing Conference (EUSIPCO), Belgrade, Serbia, 2022, pp. 1482-1486
comments: 2022 30th European Signal Processing Conference (EUSIPCO), Belgrade, Serbia, 2022, pp. 1482-1486
abstract: Reinforcement Learning has drawn huge interest as a tool for solving optimal control problems. Solving a given problem (task or environment) involves converging towards an optimal policy. However, there might exist multiple optimal policies that can dramatically differ in their behaviour; for example, some may be faster than the others but at the expense of greater risk. We consider and study a distribution of optimal policies. We design a curiosity-augmented Metropolis algorithm (CAMEO), such that we can sample optimal policies, and such that these policies effectively adopt diverse behaviours, since this implies greater coverage of the different possible optimal policies. In experimental simulations we show that CAMEO indeed obtains policies that all solve classic control problems, and even in the challenging case of environments that provide sparse rewards. We further show that the different policies we sample present different risk profiles, corresponding to interesting practical applications in interpretability, and represents a first step towards learning the distribution of optimal policies itself.
summary: Reinforcement Learning has drawn huge interest as a tool for solving optimal control problems. Solving a given problem (task or environment) involves converging towards an optimal policy. However, there might exist multiple optimal policies that can dramatically differ in their behaviour; for example, some may be faster than the others but at the expense of greater risk. We consider and study a distribution of optimal policies. We design a curiosity-augmented Metropolis algorithm (CAMEO), such that we can sample optimal policies, and such that these policies effectively adopt diverse behaviours, since this implies greater coverage of the different possible optimal policies. In experimental simulations we show that CAMEO indeed obtains policies that all solve classic control problems, and even in the challenging case of environments that provide sparse rewards. We further show that the different policies we sample present different risk profiles, corresponding to interesting practical applications in interpretability, and represents a first step towards learning the distribution of optimal policies itself.
abstract_zh: 强化学习作为解决最优控制问题的工具引起了人们的极大兴趣。解决给定问题（任务或环境）涉及收敛到最优策略。然而，可能存在多种行为上可能存在显着差异的最优策略；例如，有些可能比其他更快，但代价是风险更大。我们考虑并研究最优政策的分布。我们设计了一种好奇心增强的 Metropolis 算法（CAMEO），这样我们就可以对最优策略进行采样，并且这些策略有效地采用不同的行为，因为这意味着对不同可能的最优策略的更大覆盖。在实验模拟中，我们表明 CAMEO 确实获得了所有解决经典控制问题的策略，甚至在提供稀疏奖励的环境的挑战性情况下也是如此。我们进一步表明，我们抽样的不同政策呈现出不同的风险状况，对应于可解释性方面有趣的实际应用，并且代表了学习最优政策本身分布的第一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CAMEO算法，通过增强好奇心的Metropolis方法，探索并采样多样化的最优策略分布，以解决强化学习中的最优控制问题。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习方法可能收敛到单一最优策略，而实际中可能存在多个行为差异显著的最优策略（如风险与效率的权衡）。现有方法难以全面覆盖这些策略分布，限制了应用的灵活性和可解释性。
AI.method: 设计CAMEO算法，在Metropolis框架中引入好奇心驱动的探索机制，通过策略间的多样性采样，生成覆盖不同行为特征的最优策略分布。
AI.result: 实验表明，CAMEO在经典控制问题及稀疏奖励环境中均能有效生成多种最优策略，且这些策略表现出不同的风险特征，适用于实际应用中的可解释性需求。
AI.conclusion: CAMEO为学习最优策略分布提供了可行方法，为强化学习在复杂场景中的灵活应用和策略可解释性研究奠定了基础。

title: Pitch-axis supermanoeuvrability in a biomimetic morphing-wing UAV
title_zh: 仿生变形翼无人机的俯仰轴超机动性
abstract: Birds and bats are extremely adept flyers: whether in hunting prey, or evading predators, post-stall manoeuvrability is a characteristic of vital importance. Their performance, in this regard, greatly exceeds that of uncrewed aerial vehicles (UAVs) of similar scale. Attempts to attain post-stall manoeuvrability, or supermanoeuvrability, in UAVs have typically focused on thrust-vectoring technology. Here we show that biomimetic wing morphing offers an additional pathway to classical supermanoeuvrability, as well as novel forms of bioinspired post-stall manoeuvrability. Using a state-of-the-art flight simulator, equipped with a multibody model of lifting surface motion and a delay differential equation (Goman-Khrabrov) dynamic stall model for all lifting surfaces, we demonstrate the capability of a biomimetic morphing-wing UAV for two post-stall manoeuvres: a classical rapid nose-pointing-and-shooting (RaNPAS) manoeuvre; and a wall landing manoeuvre inspired by biological ballistic transitions. We develop a guidance method for these manoeuvres, based on parametric variation of nonlinear longitudinal stability profiles, which allows efficient exploration of the space of post-stall manoeuvres in these types of UAVs; and yields insight into effective morphing kinematics to enable these manoeuvres. Our results demonstrate the capability of biomimetic morphing, and morphing control of nonlinear longitudinal stability, to enable advanced forms of transient supermanoeuvrability in UAVs.
summary: Birds and bats are extremely adept flyers: whether in hunting prey, or evading predators, post-stall manoeuvrability is a characteristic of vital importance. Their performance, in this regard, greatly exceeds that of uncrewed aerial vehicles (UAVs) of similar scale. Attempts to attain post-stall manoeuvrability, or supermanoeuvrability, in UAVs have typically focused on thrust-vectoring technology. Here we show that biomimetic wing morphing offers an additional pathway to classical supermanoeuvrability, as well as novel forms of bioinspired post-stall manoeuvrability. Using a state-of-the-art flight simulator, equipped with a multibody model of lifting surface motion and a delay differential equation (Goman-Khrabrov) dynamic stall model for all lifting surfaces, we demonstrate the capability of a biomimetic morphing-wing UAV for two post-stall manoeuvres: a classical rapid nose-pointing-and-shooting (RaNPAS) manoeuvre; and a wall landing manoeuvre inspired by biological ballistic transitions. We develop a guidance method for these manoeuvres, based on parametric variation of nonlinear longitudinal stability profiles, which allows efficient exploration of the space of post-stall manoeuvres in these types of UAVs; and yields insight into effective morphing kinematics to enable these manoeuvres. Our results demonstrate the capability of biomimetic morphing, and morphing control of nonlinear longitudinal stability, to enable advanced forms of transient supermanoeuvrability in UAVs.
abstract_zh: 鸟类和蝙蝠是极其擅长飞行的动物：无论是捕猎猎物还是躲避掠食者，失速后的机动性都是至关重要的特性。在这方面，它们的性能大大超过了类似规模的无人驾驶飞行器（UAV）。在无人机中实现失速后机动性或超机动性的尝试通常集中在推力矢量技术上。在这里，我们展示了仿生机翼变形为经典的超机动性以及受仿生启发的失速后机动性提供了一条额外的途径。使用最先进的飞行模拟器，配备升力面运动的多体模型和所有升力面的延迟微分方程（Goman-Khrabrov）动态失速模型，我们展示了仿生变形翼无人机进行两种失速后机动的能力：经典的快速机头指向射击（RaNPAS）机动；以及受生物弹道转变启发的墙壁着陆机动。我们为这些机动开发了一种基于非线性纵向稳定性曲线的参数变化的引导方法，该方法可以有效地探索这些类型的无人机的失速后机动空间；并深入了解有效的变形运动学以实现这些机动。我们的结果证明了仿生变形和非线性纵向稳定性变形控制的能力，可以实现无人机瞬态超机动性的高级形式。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了仿生变形单翼无人机在俯仰轴上的超机动性，通过模拟生物飞行特性实现失速后机动能力。
AI.motivation: 鸟类和蝙蝠的失速后机动性远超同尺度无人机，传统推力矢量技术存在局限，需探索仿生变形单翼的新途径。
AI.method: 基于多体动力学模型和Goman-Khrabrov动态失速方程，构建飞行仿真系统，设计参数化非线性纵向稳定性剖面指导方法，验证两种失速后机动（RaNPAS和壁面着陆）。
AI.result: 仿生变形单翼无人机成功实现经典RaNPAS机动和仿生壁面着陆机动，揭示了有效变形单翼运动学参数。
AI.conclusion: 仿生变形单翼结合非线性稳定性控制可显著提升无人机瞬态超机动性，为新型飞行器设计提供生物启发思路。

search_text: Pitch-axis supermanoeuvrability in a biomimetic morphing-wing UAV 仿生变形翼无人机的俯仰轴超机动性 Birds and bats are extremely adept flyers: whether in hunting prey, or evading predators, post-stall manoeuvrability is a characteristic of vital importance. Their performance, in this regard, greatly exceeds that of uncrewed aerial vehicles (UAVs) of similar scale. Attempts to attain post-stall manoeuvrability, or supermanoeuvrability, in UAVs have typically focused on thrust-vectoring technology. Here we show that biomimetic wing morphing offers an additional pathway to classical supermanoeuvrability, as well as novel forms of bioinspired post-stall manoeuvrability. Using a state-of-the-art flight simulator, equipped with a multibody model of lifting surface motion and a delay differential equation (Goman-Khrabrov) dynamic stall model for all lifting surfaces, we demonstrate the capability of a biomimetic morphing-wing UAV for two post-stall manoeuvres: a classical rapid nose-pointing-and-shooting (RaNPAS) manoeuvre; and a wall landing manoeuvre inspired by biological ballistic transitions. We develop a guidance method for these manoeuvres, based on parametric variation of nonlinear longitudinal stability profiles, which allows efficient exploration of the space of post-stall manoeuvres in these types of UAVs; and yields insight into effective morphing kinematics to enable these manoeuvres. Our results demonstrate the capability of biomimetic morphing, and morphing control of nonlinear longitudinal stability, to enable advanced forms of transient supermanoeuvrability in UAVs. 鸟类和蝙蝠是极其擅长飞行的动物：无论是捕猎猎物还是躲避掠食者，失速后的机动性都是至关重要的特性。在这方面，它们的性能大大超过了类似规模的无人驾驶飞行器（UAV）。在无人机中实现失速后机动性或超机动性的尝试通常集中在推力矢量技术上。在这里，我们展示了仿生机翼变形为经典的超机动性以及受仿生启发的失速后机动性提供了一条额外的途径。使用最先进的飞行模拟器，配备升力面运动的多体模型和所有升力面的延迟微分方程（Goman-Khrabrov）动态失速模型，我们展示了仿生变形翼无人机进行两种失速后机动的能力：经典的快速机头指向射击（RaNPAS）机动；以及受生物弹道转变启发的墙壁着陆机动。我们为这些机动开发了一种基于非线性纵向稳定性曲线的参数变化的引导方法，该方法可以有效地探索这些类型的无人机的失速后机动空间；并深入了解有效的变形运动学以实现这些机动。我们的结果证明了仿生变形和非线性纵向稳定性变形控制的能力，可以实现无人机瞬态超机动性的高级形式。 本文研究了仿生变形单翼无人机在俯仰轴上的超机动性，通过模拟生物飞行特性实现失速后机动能力。 Arion Pons,Fehmi Cirak physics.bio-ph,cs.RO

title: Action Conditioned Tactile Prediction: case study on slip prediction
title_zh: 动作条件触觉预测：滑移预测案例研究
comment: Proceeding of Robotics: Science and Systems (RSS 2022)
comments: Proceeding of Robotics: Science and Systems (RSS 2022)
abstract: Tactile predictive models can be useful across several robotic manipulation tasks, e.g. robotic pushing, robotic grasping, slip avoidance, and in-hand manipulation. However, available tactile prediction models are mostly studied for image-based tactile sensors and there is no comparison study indicating the best performing models. In this paper, we presented two novel data-driven action-conditioned models for predicting tactile signals during real-world physical robot interaction tasks (1) action condition tactile prediction and (2) action conditioned tactile-video prediction models. We use a magnetic-based tactile sensor that is challenging to analyse and test state-of-the-art predictive models and the only existing bespoke tactile prediction model. We compare the performance of these models with those of our proposed models. We perform the comparison study using our novel tactile-enabled dataset containing 51,000 tactile frames of a real-world robotic manipulation task with 11 flat-surfaced household objects. Our experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our proposed tactile prediction models in terms of qualitative, quantitative and slip prediction scores.
summary: Tactile predictive models can be useful across several robotic manipulation tasks, e.g. robotic pushing, robotic grasping, slip avoidance, and in-hand manipulation. However, available tactile prediction models are mostly studied for image-based tactile sensors and there is no comparison study indicating the best performing models. In this paper, we presented two novel data-driven action-conditioned models for predicting tactile signals during real-world physical robot interaction tasks (1) action condition tactile prediction and (2) action conditioned tactile-video prediction models. We use a magnetic-based tactile sensor that is challenging to analyse and test state-of-the-art predictive models and the only existing bespoke tactile prediction model. We compare the performance of these models with those of our proposed models. We perform the comparison study using our novel tactile-enabled dataset containing 51,000 tactile frames of a real-world robotic manipulation task with 11 flat-surfaced household objects. Our experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our proposed tactile prediction models in terms of qualitative, quantitative and slip prediction scores.
abstract_zh: 触觉预测模型可用于多种机器人操作任务，例如机器人推动、机器人抓取、防滑和手动操作。然而，可用的触觉预测模型主要针对基于图像的触觉传感器进行研究，并且没有比较研究表明性能最佳的模型。在本文中，我们提出了两种新颖的数据驱动的动作条件模型，用于在现实世界的物理机器人交互任务中预测触觉信号（1）动作条件触觉预测和（2）动作条件触觉视频预测模型。我们使用基于磁性的触觉传感器，该传感器对分析和测试最先进的预测模型和唯一现有的定制触觉预测模型具有挑战性。我们将这些模型的性能与我们提出的模型的性能进行比较。我们使用新颖的触觉数据集进行比较研究，该数据集包含 51,000 个现实世界机器人操作任务的触觉框架，其中包含 11 个平面家用物品。我们的实验结果证明了我们提出的触觉预测模型在定性、定量和滑动预测分数方面的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种动作条件触觉预测模型，并在滑动预测案例中验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有触觉预测模型多针对图像传感器，缺乏对磁力传感器的比较研究，且未明确最佳模型。
AI.method: 构建两种数据驱动的动作条件模型，使用磁力触觉传感器及包含51,000帧的新型数据集进行对比实验。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提模型在定性分析、定量指标及滑动预测评分上均优于现有模型。
AI.conclusion: 动作条件触觉预测模型能有效提升机器人操作中的滑动预测性能，为触觉感知研究提供新方向。

title: Inferring extended summary causal graphs from observational time series
title_zh: 从观察时间序列推断扩展总结因果图
abstract: This study addresses the problem of learning an extended summary causal graph on time series. The algorithms we propose fit within the well-known constraint-based framework for causal discovery and make use of information-theoretic measures to determine (in)dependencies between time series. We first introduce generalizations of the causation entropy measure to any lagged or instantaneous relations, prior to using this measure to construct extended summary causal graphs by adapting two well-known algorithms, namely PC and FCI. The behavior of our methods is illustrated through several experiments run on simulated and real datasets.
summary: This study addresses the problem of learning an extended summary causal graph on time series. The algorithms we propose fit within the well-known constraint-based framework for causal discovery and make use of information-theoretic measures to determine (in)dependencies between time series. We first introduce generalizations of the causation entropy measure to any lagged or instantaneous relations, prior to using this measure to construct extended summary causal graphs by adapting two well-known algorithms, namely PC and FCI. The behavior of our methods is illustrated through several experiments run on simulated and real datasets.
abstract_zh: 这项研究解决了学习时间序列上的扩展总结因果图的问题。我们提出的算法符合众所周知的基于约束的因果发现框架，并利用信息论测量来确定时间序列之间的（内）依赖性。我们首先将因果熵度量推广到任何滞后或瞬时关系，然后通过采用两种众所周知的算法（即 PC 和 FCI）​​使用该度量来构建扩展的摘要因果图。我们的方法的行为通过在模拟和真实数据集上运行的几个实验来说明。

AI.tldr: 本文的主要任务是从观测时间序列中推断扩展的摘要因果图
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理时间序列的滞后或即时因果关系时存在局限性，需扩展因果图结构以更准确捕捉因果关系
AI.method: 通过推广因果熵度量至滞后和即时关系，并改进PC和FCI算法以构建扩展的摘要因果图
AI.result: 在模拟和真实数据集上的实验验证了方法的有效性，能够准确识别时间序列中的因果关系
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了时间序列因果关系推断的准确性，适用于复杂动态系统的建模分析

title: Leveraging Dynamic Objects for Relative Localization Correction in a Connected Autonomous Vehicle Network
title_zh: 利用动态对象在互联自动驾驶车辆网络中进行相对定位校正
abstract: High-accurate localization is crucial for the safety and reliability of autonomous driving, especially for the information fusion of collective perception that aims to further improve road safety by sharing information in a communication network of ConnectedAutonomous Vehicles (CAV). In this scenario, small localization errors can impose additional difficulty on fusing the information from different CAVs. In this paper, we propose a RANSAC-based (RANdom SAmple Consensus) method to correct the relative localization errors between two CAVs in order to ease the information fusion among the CAVs. Different from previous LiDAR-based localization algorithms that only take the static environmental information into consideration, this method also leverages the dynamic objects for localization thanks to the real-time data sharing between CAVs. Specifically, in addition to the static objects like poles, fences, and facades, the object centers of the detected dynamic vehicles are also used as keypoints for the matching of two point sets. The experiments on the synthetic dataset COMAP show that the proposed method can greatly decrease the relative localization error between two CAVs to less than 20cmas far as there are enough vehicles and poles are correctly detected by bothCAVs. Besides, our proposed method is also highly efficient in runtime and can be used in real-time scenarios of autonomous driving.
summary: High-accurate localization is crucial for the safety and reliability of autonomous driving, especially for the information fusion of collective perception that aims to further improve road safety by sharing information in a communication network of ConnectedAutonomous Vehicles (CAV). In this scenario, small localization errors can impose additional difficulty on fusing the information from different CAVs. In this paper, we propose a RANSAC-based (RANdom SAmple Consensus) method to correct the relative localization errors between two CAVs in order to ease the information fusion among the CAVs. Different from previous LiDAR-based localization algorithms that only take the static environmental information into consideration, this method also leverages the dynamic objects for localization thanks to the real-time data sharing between CAVs. Specifically, in addition to the static objects like poles, fences, and facades, the object centers of the detected dynamic vehicles are also used as keypoints for the matching of two point sets. The experiments on the synthetic dataset COMAP show that the proposed method can greatly decrease the relative localization error between two CAVs to less than 20cmas far as there are enough vehicles and poles are correctly detected by bothCAVs. Besides, our proposed method is also highly efficient in runtime and can be used in real-time scenarios of autonomous driving.
abstract_zh: 高精度定位对于自动驾驶的安全性和可靠性至关重要，尤其是集体感知的信息融合，旨在通过在互联自动驾驶车辆（CAV）的通信网络中共享信息来进一步提高道路安全。在这种情况下，小的定位错误会给融合来自不同 CAV 的信息带来额外的困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于RANSAC（RANdom SAmple Consensus）的方法来纠正两个CAV之间的相对定位误差，以简化CAV之间的信息融合。与以往仅考虑静态环境信息的基于激光雷达的定位算法不同，由于CAV之间的实时数据共享，该方法还利用动态物体进行定位。具体来说，除了电线杆、栅栏、立面等静态物体外，检测到的动态车辆的物体中心也被用作两个点集匹配的关键点。在合成数据集 COMAP 上的实验表明，只要有足够的车辆并且两个 CAV 都能正确检测到杆，该方法可以将两个 CAV 之间的相对定位误差大大降低到小于 20 cmas。此外，我们提出的方法在运行时也非常高效，可以用于自动驾驶的实时场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于RANSAC的方法，利用动态物体修正车联网中自动驾驶车辆的相对定位误差，以提升信息融合的准确性。
AI.motivation: 高精度定位对自动驾驶安全至关重要，但现有基于静态环境信息的定位算法难以应对车联网中多车信息融合时的微小定位误差问题。
AI.method: 在传统LiDAR静态物体匹配基础上，引入动态车辆检测中心作为关键点，通过实时共享的动态物体数据增强点集匹配的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在COMAP合成数据集实验中，当车辆和路标均被正确检测时，两车相对定位误差可降至20cm以下，且算法具备实时性优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合动态物体信息有效提升了车联网环境下的相对定位精度，为实时多车协同感知提供了可行解决方案。

search_text: Leveraging Dynamic Objects for Relative Localization Correction in a Connected Autonomous Vehicle Network 利用动态对象在互联自动驾驶车辆网络中进行相对定位校正 High-accurate localization is crucial for the safety and reliability of autonomous driving, especially for the information fusion of collective perception that aims to further improve road safety by sharing information in a communication network of ConnectedAutonomous Vehicles (CAV). In this scenario, small localization errors can impose additional difficulty on fusing the information from different CAVs. In this paper, we propose a RANSAC-based (RANdom SAmple Consensus) method to correct the relative localization errors between two CAVs in order to ease the information fusion among the CAVs. Different from previous LiDAR-based localization algorithms that only take the static environmental information into consideration, this method also leverages the dynamic objects for localization thanks to the real-time data sharing between CAVs. Specifically, in addition to the static objects like poles, fences, and facades, the object centers of the detected dynamic vehicles are also used as keypoints for the matching of two point sets. The experiments on the synthetic dataset COMAP show that the proposed method can greatly decrease the relative localization error between two CAVs to less than 20cmas far as there are enough vehicles and poles are correctly detected by bothCAVs. Besides, our proposed method is also highly efficient in runtime and can be used in real-time scenarios of autonomous driving. 高精度定位对于自动驾驶的安全性和可靠性至关重要，尤其是集体感知的信息融合，旨在通过在互联自动驾驶车辆（CAV）的通信网络中共享信息来进一步提高道路安全。在这种情况下，小的定位错误会给融合来自不同 CAV 的信息带来额外的困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于RANSAC（RANdom SAmple Consensus）的方法来纠正两个CAV之间的相对定位误差，以简化CAV之间的信息融合。与以往仅考虑静态环境信息的基于激光雷达的定位算法不同，由于CAV之间的实时数据共享，该方法还利用动态物体进行定位。具体来说，除了电线杆、栅栏、立面等静态物体外，检测到的动态车辆的物体中心也被用作两个点集匹配的关键点。在合成数据集 COMAP 上的实验表明，只要有足够的车辆并且两个 CAV 都能正确检测到杆，该方法可以将两个 CAV 之间的相对定位误差大大降低到小于 20 cmas。此外，我们提出的方法在运行时也非常高效，可以用于自动驾驶的实时场景。 本文提出一种基于RANSAC的方法，利用动态物体修正车联网中自动驾驶车辆的相对定位误差，以提升信息融合的准确性。 Yunshuang Yuan,Monika Sester cs.RO

title: A Weakly-Supervised Iterative Graph-Based Approach to Retrieve COVID-19 Misinformation Topics
title_zh: 一种基于弱监督迭代图的方法来检索 COVID-19 错误信息主题
abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has been accompanied by an `infodemic' -- of accurate and inaccurate health information across social media. Detecting misinformation amidst dynamically changing information landscape is challenging; identifying relevant keywords and posts is arduous due to the large amount of human effort required to inspect the content and sources of posts. We aim to reduce the resource cost of this process by introducing a weakly-supervised iterative graph-based approach to detect keywords, topics, and themes related to misinformation, with a focus on COVID-19. Our approach can successfully detect specific topics from general misinformation-related seed words in a few seed texts. Our approach utilizes the BERT-based Word Graph Search (BWGS) algorithm that builds on context-based neural network embeddings for retrieving misinformation-related posts. We utilize Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) topic modeling for obtaining misinformation-related themes from the texts returned by BWGS. Furthermore, we propose the BERT-based Multi-directional Word Graph Search (BMDWGS) algorithm that utilizes greater starting context information for misinformation extraction. In addition to a qualitative analysis of our approach, our quantitative analyses show that BWGS and BMDWGS are effective in extracting misinformation-related content compared to common baselines in low data resource settings. Extracting such content is useful for uncovering prevalent misconceptions and concerns and for facilitating precision public health messaging campaigns to improve health behaviors.
summary: The COVID-19 pandemic has been accompanied by an `infodemic' -- of accurate and inaccurate health information across social media. Detecting misinformation amidst dynamically changing information landscape is challenging; identifying relevant keywords and posts is arduous due to the large amount of human effort required to inspect the content and sources of posts. We aim to reduce the resource cost of this process by introducing a weakly-supervised iterative graph-based approach to detect keywords, topics, and themes related to misinformation, with a focus on COVID-19. Our approach can successfully detect specific topics from general misinformation-related seed words in a few seed texts. Our approach utilizes the BERT-based Word Graph Search (BWGS) algorithm that builds on context-based neural network embeddings for retrieving misinformation-related posts. We utilize Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) topic modeling for obtaining misinformation-related themes from the texts returned by BWGS. Furthermore, we propose the BERT-based Multi-directional Word Graph Search (BMDWGS) algorithm that utilizes greater starting context information for misinformation extraction. In addition to a qualitative analysis of our approach, our quantitative analyses show that BWGS and BMDWGS are effective in extracting misinformation-related content compared to common baselines in low data resource settings. Extracting such content is useful for uncovering prevalent misconceptions and concerns and for facilitating precision public health messaging campaigns to improve health behaviors.
abstract_zh: COVID-19 大流行伴随着“信息流行病”——社交媒体上准确和不准确的健康信息。在动态变化的信息环境中检测错误信息具有挑战性；由于检查帖子内容和来源需要大量人力，因此识别相关关键词和帖子非常困难。我们的目标是通过引入基于弱监督的迭代图的方法来检测与错误信息相关的关键词、主题和主题，以降低此过程的资源成本，重点关注 COVID-19。我们的方法可以成功地从一些种子文本中与一般错误信息相关的种子词中检测出特定主题。我们的方法利用基于 BERT 的词图搜索 (BWGS) 算法，该算法建立在基于上下文的神经网络嵌入的基础上，用于检索与错误信息相关的帖子。我们利用潜在狄利克雷分配 (LDA) 主题建模从 BWGS 返回的文本中获取与错误信息相关的主题。此外，我们提出了基于 BERT 的多向词图搜索（BMDWGS）算法，该算法利用更多的起始上下文信息来提取错误信息。除了对我们的方法进行定性分析之外，我们的定量分析表明，与低数据资源设置中的常见基线相比，BWGS 和 BMDWGS 在提取错误信息相关内容方面是有效的。提取此类内容有助于发现普遍存在的误解和担忧，并有助于促进精准的公共卫生信息宣传活动，以改善健康行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督迭代图基方法，用于检测与新冠疫情相关的虚假信息主题。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情伴随大量社交媒体上的健康信息真假混杂，传统方法依赖人工审核效率低且成本高，需自动化手段降低资源消耗。
AI.method: 基于BERT的词图搜索（BWGS）算法结合上下文嵌入提取虚假信息相关帖子，利用LDA主题模型挖掘主题，并提出多向词图搜索（BMDWGS）算法增强上下文利用。
AI.result: 定量分析表明BWGS和BMDWGS在低数据资源下优于常见基线方法，能有效提取虚假信息内容。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可揭示流行误解并支持精准公共卫生宣传，为应对信息疫情提供技术支撑。

Our approach can successfully detect specific topics from general misinformation-related seed words in a few seed texts. title: Bias Analysis of Spatial Coherence-Based RTF Vector Estimation for Acoustic Sensor Networks in a Diffuse Sound Field
title_zh: 弥散声场中声学传感器网络基于空间相干性 RTF 矢量估计的偏差分析
abstract: In many multi-microphone algorithms, an estimate of the relative transfer functions (RTFs) of the desired speaker is required. Recently, a computationally efficient RTF vector estimation method was proposed for acoustic sensor networks, assuming that the spatial coherence (SC) of the noise component between a local microphone array and multiple external microphones is low. Aiming at optimizing the output signal-to-noise ratio (SNR), this method linearly combines multiple RTF vector estimates, where the complex-valued weights are computed using a generalized eigenvalue decomposition (GEVD). In this paper, we perform a theoretical bias analysis for the SC-based RTF vector estimation method with multiple external microphones. Assuming a certain model for the noise field, we derive an analytical expression for the weights, showing that the optimal model-based weights are real-valued and only depend on the input SNR in the external microphones. Simulations with real-world recordings show a good accordance of the GEVD-based and the model-based weights. Nevertheless, the results also indicate that in practice, estimation errors occur which the model-based weights cannot account for.
summary: In many multi-microphone algorithms, an estimate of the relative transfer functions (RTFs) of the desired speaker is required. Recently, a computationally efficient RTF vector estimation method was proposed for acoustic sensor networks, assuming that the spatial coherence (SC) of the noise component between a local microphone array and multiple external microphones is low. Aiming at optimizing the output signal-to-noise ratio (SNR), this method linearly combines multiple RTF vector estimates, where the complex-valued weights are computed using a generalized eigenvalue decomposition (GEVD). In this paper, we perform a theoretical bias analysis for the SC-based RTF vector estimation method with multiple external microphones. Assuming a certain model for the noise field, we derive an analytical expression for the weights, showing that the optimal model-based weights are real-valued and only depend on the input SNR in the external microphones. Simulations with real-world recordings show a good accordance of the GEVD-based and the model-based weights. Nevertheless, the results also indicate that in practice, estimation errors occur which the model-based weights cannot account for.
abstract_zh: 在许多多麦克风算法中，需要估计所需讲话者的相对传递函数 (RTF)。最近，假设本地麦克风阵列和多个外部麦克风之间的噪声分量的空间相干性（SC）较低，提出了一种用于声学传感器网络的计算高效的 RTF 矢量估计方法。该方法旨在优化输出信噪比 (SNR)，线性组合多个 RTF 向量估计，其中使用广义特征值分解 (GEVD) 计算复值权重。在本文中，我们对具有多个外部麦克风的基于 SC 的 RTF 矢量估计方法进行了理论偏差分析。假设噪声场有一定的模型，我们推导出权重的解析表达式，表明基于模型的最佳权重是实值，并且仅取决于外部麦克风的输入信噪比。现实世界记录的模拟显示基于 GEVD 的权重和基于模型的权重具有良好的一致性。然而，结果还表明，在实践中，会出现基于模型的权重无法解释的估计误差。

AI.tldr: 本文对基于空间相干性的RTF向量估计方法在扩散声场中的偏差进行理论分析，推导权重解析表达式并验证其与GEVD方法的一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有RTF估计方法在扩散声场中可能存在偏差，需优化信噪比且现有权重计算方式未充分考虑噪声模型影响。
AI.method: 假设噪声场模型推导权重解析式，通过广义特征值分解计算复值权重，并利用真实录音进行仿真验证。
AI.result: 理论推导显示最优权重为实值且仅依赖外部麦克风SNR，仿真表明GEVD与模型权重一致，但实际存在模型未涵盖的估计误差。
AI.conclusion: 理论分析验证了权重特性，但实际应用中需考虑模型未覆盖的误差来源以提升估计精度。

search_text: Bias Analysis of Spatial Coherence-Based RTF Vector Estimation for Acoustic Sensor Networks in a Diffuse Sound Field 弥散声场中声学传感器网络基于空间相干性 RTF 矢量估计的偏差分析 In many multi-microphone algorithms, an estimate of the relative transfer functions (RTFs) of the desired speaker is required. Recently, a computationally efficient RTF vector estimation method was proposed for acoustic sensor networks, assuming that the spatial coherence (SC) of the noise component between a local microphone array and multiple external microphones is low. Aiming at optimizing the output signal-to-noise ratio (SNR), this method linearly combines multiple RTF vector estimates, where the complex-valued weights are computed using a generalized eigenvalue decomposition (GEVD). In this paper, we perform a theoretical bias analysis for the SC-based RTF vector estimation method with multiple external microphones. Assuming a certain model for the noise field, we derive an analytical expression for the weights, showing that the optimal model-based weights are real-valued and only depend on the input SNR in the external microphones. Simulations with real-world recordings show a good accordance of the GEVD-based and the model-based weights. Nevertheless, the results also indicate that in practice, estimation errors occur which the model-based weights cannot account for. 在许多多麦克风算法中，需要估计所需讲话者的相对传递函数 (RTF)。最近，假设本地麦克风阵列和多个外部麦克风之间的噪声分量的空间相干性（SC）较低，提出了一种用于声学传感器网络的计算高效的 RTF 矢量估计方法。该方法旨在优化输出信噪比 (SNR)，线性组合多个 RTF 向量估计，其中使用广义特征值分解 (GEVD) 计算复值权重。在本文中，我们对具有多个外部麦克风的基于 SC 的 RTF 矢量估计方法进行了理论偏差分析。假设噪声场有一定的模型，我们推导出权重的解析表达式，表明基于模型的最佳权重是实值，并且仅取决于外部麦克风的输入信噪比。现实世界记录的模拟显示基于 GEVD 的权重和基于模型的权重具有良好的一致性。然而，结果还表明，在实践中，会出现基于模型的权重无法解释的估计误差。 本文对基于空间相干性的RTF向量估计方法在扩散声场中的偏差进行理论分析，推导权重解析表达式并验证其与GEVD方法的一致性。 Wiebke Middelberg,Simon Doclo eess.AS,cs.SD,eess.SP

title: UIF: An Objective Quality Assessment for Underwater Image Enhancement
title_zh: UIF：水下图像增强的客观质量评估
comment: This paper was submitted to ACMMM 2021
comments: This paper was submitted to ACMMM 2021
abstract: Due to complex and volatile lighting environment, underwater imaging can be readily impaired by light scattering, warping, and noises. To improve the visual quality, Underwater Image Enhancement (UIE) techniques have been widely studied. Recent efforts have also been contributed to evaluate and compare the UIE performances with subjective and objective methods. However, the subjective evaluation is time-consuming and uneconomic for all images, while existing objective methods have limited capabilities for the newly-developed UIE approaches based on deep learning. To fill this gap, we propose an Underwater Image Fidelity (UIF) metric for objective evaluation of enhanced underwater images. By exploiting the statistical features of these images, we present to extract naturalness-related, sharpness-related, and structure-related features. Among them, the naturalness-related and sharpness-related features evaluate visual improvement of enhanced images; the structure-related feature indicates structural similarity between images before and after UIE. Then, we employ support vector regression to fuse the above three features into a final UIF metric. In addition, we have also established a large-scale UIE database with subjective scores, namely Underwater Image Enhancement Database (UIED), which is utilized as a benchmark to compare all objective metrics. Experimental results confirm that the proposed UIF outperforms a variety of underwater and general-purpose image quality metrics.
summary: Due to complex and volatile lighting environment, underwater imaging can be readily impaired by light scattering, warping, and noises. To improve the visual quality, Underwater Image Enhancement (UIE) techniques have been widely studied. Recent efforts have also been contributed to evaluate and compare the UIE performances with subjective and objective methods. However, the subjective evaluation is time-consuming and uneconomic for all images, while existing objective methods have limited capabilities for the newly-developed UIE approaches based on deep learning. To fill this gap, we propose an Underwater Image Fidelity (UIF) metric for objective evaluation of enhanced underwater images. By exploiting the statistical features of these images, we present to extract naturalness-related, sharpness-related, and structure-related features. Among them, the naturalness-related and sharpness-related features evaluate visual improvement of enhanced images; the structure-related feature indicates structural similarity between images before and after UIE. Then, we employ support vector regression to fuse the above three features into a final UIF metric. In addition, we have also established a large-scale UIE database with subjective scores, namely Underwater Image Enhancement Database (UIED), which is utilized as a benchmark to compare all objective metrics. Experimental results confirm that the proposed UIF outperforms a variety of underwater and general-purpose image quality metrics.
abstract_zh: 由于光照环境复杂且不稳定，水下成像很容易受到光散射、扭曲和噪声的影响。为了提高视觉质量，水下图像增强（UIE）技术已被广泛研究。最近还致力于用主观和客观方法评估和比较 UIE 的表现。然而，对于所有图像来说，主观评估既耗时又不经济，而现有的客观方法对于新开发的基于深度学习的 UIE 方法来说能力有限。为了填补这一空白，我们提出了水下图像保真度（UIF）指标，用于客观评估增强型水下图像。通过利用这些图像的统计特征，我们提出提取自然度相关、清晰度相关和结构相关的特征。其中，自然度相关和清晰度相关特征评估增强图像的视觉改善情况；结构相关特征表示UIE前后图像之间的结构相似性。然后，我们采用支持向量回归将上述三个特征融合为最终的 UIF 指标。此外，我们还建立了一个大规模的带有主观评分的UIE数据库，即水下图像增强数据库（UIED），作为比较所有客观指标的基准。实验结果证实，所提出的 UIF 优于各种水下和通用图像质量指标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为UIF的客观质量评估指标，用于评估水下图像增强（UIE）的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有客观评估方法难以有效评估基于深度学习的新型UIE技术，且主观评估耗时耗力，亟需一种高效可靠的客观评价体系。
AI.method: 通过提取增强图像的自然度、清晰度和结构相似性三类统计特征，结合支持向量回归构建UIF指标，并建立包含主观评分的UIED数据库作为基准。
AI.result: 实验表明UIF在多种水下及通用图像质量评估指标中表现最优。
AI.conclusion: UIF为水下图像增强效果提供了有效且可靠的客观评价方法，适用于新型深度学习模型的评估。

authors_text: Raffaele De Rose,Tommaso Zanotti,Francesco Maria Puglisi,Felice Crupi,Paolo Pavan,Marco Lanuzza
title: Smart Material Implication Using Spin-Transfer Torque Magnetic Tunnel Junctions for Logic-in-Memory Computing
title_zh: 使用自旋转移扭矩磁隧道结进行内存中逻辑计算的智能材料含义
abstract: Smart material implication (SIMPLY) logic has been recently proposed for the design of energy-efficient Logic-in-Memory (LIM) architectures based on non-volatile resistive memory devices. The SIMPLY logic is enabled by adding a comparator to the conventional IMPLY scheme. This allows performing a preliminary READ operation and hence the SET operation only in the case it is actually required. This work explores the SIMPLY logic scheme using nanoscale spin-transfer torque magnetic tunnel junction (STT-MTJ) devices. The performance of the STT-MTJ based SIMPLY architecture is analyzed by varying the load resistor and applied voltages to implement both READ and SET operations, while also investigating the effect of temperature on circuit operation. Obtained results show an existing tradeoff between error rate and energy consumption, which can be effectively managed by properly setting the values of load resistor and applied voltages. In addition, our analysis proves that tracking the temperature dependence of the MTJ properties through a proportional to absolute temperature (PTAT) reference voltage at the input of the comparator is beneficial to mitigate the reliability degradation under temperature variations.
summary: Smart material implication (SIMPLY) logic has been recently proposed for the design of energy-efficient Logic-in-Memory (LIM) architectures based on non-volatile resistive memory devices. The SIMPLY logic is enabled by adding a comparator to the conventional IMPLY scheme. This allows performing a preliminary READ operation and hence the SET operation only in the case it is actually required. This work explores the SIMPLY logic scheme using nanoscale spin-transfer torque magnetic tunnel junction (STT-MTJ) devices. The performance of the STT-MTJ based SIMPLY architecture is analyzed by varying the load resistor and applied voltages to implement both READ and SET operations, while also investigating the effect of temperature on circuit operation. Obtained results show an existing tradeoff between error rate and energy consumption, which can be effectively managed by properly setting the values of load resistor and applied voltages. In addition, our analysis proves that tracking the temperature dependence of the MTJ properties through a proportional to absolute temperature (PTAT) reference voltage at the input of the comparator is beneficial to mitigate the reliability degradation under temperature variations.
abstract_zh: 最近提出了智能材料蕴含（SIMPLY）逻辑，用于基于非易失性电阻存储器件的节能内存逻辑（LIM）架构的设计。 SIMPLY 逻辑是通过在传统的 IMPLY 方案中添加一个比较器来启用的。这允许执行初步读取操作，因此仅在实际需要的情况下才执行设置操作。这项工作探索了使用纳米级自旋转移矩磁隧道结（STT-MTJ）器件的简单逻辑方案。通过改变负载电阻和施加的电压来实现读取和设置操作，分析基于 STT-MTJ 的 SIMPLY 架构的性能，同时还研究温度对电路操作的影响。获得的结果表明错误率和能耗之间存在权衡，可以通过正确设置负载电阻值和施加电压来有效管理这一权衡。此外，我们的分析证明，通过比较器输入端的与绝对温度成比例 (PTAT) 参考电压来跟踪 MTJ 特性的温度依赖性，有利于减轻温度变化下的可靠性下降。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于自旋转移力矩磁隧道结（STT-MTJ）的智能材料蕴含逻辑（SIMPLY）在逻辑-存储器计算中的应用，分析其性能与温度影响。
AI.motivation: 为提升逻辑-存储器（LIM）架构的能效，通过引入比较器优化传统IMPLY方案，减少不必要的写入操作并提高可靠性。
AI.method: 采用STT-MTJ器件，通过调节负载电阻和电压实现读写操作，结合温度对MTJ特性的影响分析，引入比例于绝对温度（PTAT）参考电压优化电路性能。
AI.result: 发现错误率与能耗存在权衡关系，通过优化电阻和电压可有效管理；PTAT参考电压能缓解温度变化导致的可靠性下降。
AI.conclusion: STT-MTJ器件结合SIMPLY逻辑可实现高效的LIM计算，参数优化与PTAT参考电压设计是提升系统可靠性的关键。

tldr: 本文研究基于自旋转移力矩磁隧道结（STT-MTJ）的智能材料蕴含逻辑（SIMPLY）在逻辑-存储器计算中的应用，分析其性能与温度影响。
motivation: 为提升逻辑-存储器（LIM）架构的能效，通过引入比较器优化传统IMPLY方案，减少不必要的写入操作并提高可靠性。
method: 采用STT-MTJ器件，通过调节负载电阻和电压实现读写操作，结合温度对MTJ特性的影响分析，引入比例于绝对温度（PTAT）参考电压优化电路性能。
result: 发现错误率与能耗存在权衡关系，通过优化电阻和电压可有效管理；PTAT参考电压能缓解温度变化导致的可靠性下降。
conclusion: STT-MTJ器件结合SIMPLY逻辑可实现高效的LIM计算，参数优化与PTAT参考电压设计是提升系统可靠性的关键。
search_text: Smart Material Implication Using Spin-Transfer Torque Magnetic Tunnel Junctions for Logic-in-Memory Computing 使用自旋转移扭矩磁隧道结进行内存中逻辑计算的智能材料含义 Smart material implication (SIMPLY) logic has been recently proposed for the design of energy-efficient Logic-in-Memory (LIM) architectures based on non-volatile resistive memory devices. The SIMPLY logic is enabled by adding a comparator to the conventional IMPLY scheme. This allows performing a preliminary READ operation and hence the SET operation only in the case it is actually required. This work explores the SIMPLY logic scheme using nanoscale spin-transfer torque magnetic tunnel junction (STT-MTJ) devices. The performance of the STT-MTJ based SIMPLY architecture is analyzed by varying the load resistor and applied voltages to implement both READ and SET operations, while also investigating the effect of temperature on circuit operation. Obtained results show an existing tradeoff between error rate and energy consumption, which can be effectively managed by properly setting the values of load resistor and applied voltages. In addition, our analysis proves that tracking the temperature dependence of the MTJ properties through a proportional to absolute temperature (PTAT) reference voltage at the input of the comparator is beneficial to mitigate the reliability degradation under temperature variations. 最近提出了智能材料蕴含（SIMPLY）逻辑，用于基于非易失性电阻存储器件的节能内存逻辑（LIM）架构的设计。 SIMPLY 逻辑是通过在传统的 IMPLY 方案中添加一个比较器来启用的。这允许执行初步读取操作，因此仅在实际需要的情况下才执行设置操作。这项工作探索了使用纳米级自旋转移矩磁隧道结（STT-MTJ）器件的简单逻辑方案。通过改变负载电阻和施加的电压来实现读取和设置操作，分析基于 STT-MTJ 的 SIMPLY 架构的性能，同时还研究温度对电路操作的影响。获得的结果表明错误率和能耗之间存在权衡，可以通过正确设置负载电阻值和施加电压来有效管理这一权衡。此外，我们的分析证明，通过比较器输入端的与绝对温度成比例 (PTAT) 参考电压来跟踪 MTJ 特性的温度依赖性，有利于减轻温度变化下的可靠性下降。 本文研究基于自旋转移力矩磁隧道结（STT-MTJ）的智能材料蕴含逻辑（SIMPLY）在逻辑-存储器计算中的应用，分析其性能与温度影响。 Raffaele De Rose,Tommaso Zanotti,Francesco Maria Puglisi,Felice Crupi,Paolo Pavan,Marco Lanuzza cs.ET,physics.app-ph

title: Emergent Visual Sensors for Autonomous Vehicles
title_zh: 适用于自动驾驶汽车的紧急视觉传感器
abstract: Autonomous vehicles rely on perception systems to understand their surroundings for further navigation missions. Cameras are essential for perception systems due to the advantages of object detection and recognition provided by modern computer vision algorithms, comparing to other sensors, such as LiDARs and radars. However, limited by its inherent imaging principle, a standard RGB camera may perform poorly in a variety of adverse scenarios, including but not limited to: low illumination, high contrast, bad weather such as fog/rain/snow, etc. Meanwhile, estimating the 3D information from the 2D image detection is generally more difficult when compared to LiDARs or radars. Several new sensing technologies have emerged in recent years to address the limitations of conventional RGB cameras. In this paper, we review the principles of four novel image sensors: infrared cameras, range-gated cameras, polarization cameras, and event cameras. Their comparative advantages, existing or potential applications, and corresponding data processing algorithms are all presented in a systematic manner. We expect that this study will assist practitioners in the autonomous driving society with new perspectives and insights.
summary: Autonomous vehicles rely on perception systems to understand their surroundings for further navigation missions. Several new sensing technologies have emerged in recent years to address the limitations of conventional RGB cameras. Their comparative advantages, existing or potential applications, and corresponding data processing algorithms are all presented in a systematic manner. abstract_zh: 自动驾驶车辆依靠感知系统来了解周围环境，以执行进一步的导航任务。与激光雷达和雷达等其他传感器相比，由于现代计算机视觉算法提供的物体检测和识别优势，相机对于感知系统至关重要。然而，受其固有成像原理的限制，标准RGB相机在各种不利场景下可能表现不佳，包括但不限于：低照度、高对比度、雾/雨/雪等恶劣天气等。同时，与LiDAR或雷达相比，从2D图像检测中估计3D信息通常更加困难。近年来出现了几种新的传感技术来解决传统 RGB 相机的局限性。在本文中，我们回顾了四种新型图像传感器的原理：红外相机、距离选通相机、偏振相机和事件相机。它们的比较优势、现有或潜在的应用以及相应的数据处理算法都以系统的方式呈现。我们期望这项研究能够为自动驾驶社会的从业者提供新的视角和见解。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了四种新型图像传感器（红外相机、光栅相机、偏振相机和事件相机）在自动驾驶车辆中的应用与原理。
AI.motivation: 传统RGB相机在低光照、恶劣天气等场景下表现不佳，且难以准确估计3D信息，需探索新型视觉传感器以提升自动驾驶感知能力。
AI.method: 系统性地分析比较了四种新兴图像传感器的工作原理、应用场景及对应的数据处理算法。
AI.result: 总结了各传感器的优劣势及潜在应用方向，为自动驾驶领域提供了技术选型参考。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为自动驾驶从业者提供了新型视觉传感器的全面视角与技术洞察，助力突破传统相机的局限性。

authors_text: Szymon Płotka,Michal K. Grzeszczyk,Robert Brawura-Biskupski-Samaha,Paweł Gutaj,Michał Lipa,Tomasz Trzciński,Arkadiusz Sitek
title: BabyNet: Residual Transformer Module for Birth Weight Prediction on Fetal Ultrasound Video
title_zh: BabyNet：用于胎儿超声视频出生体重预测的剩余变压器模块
comment: Early accepted for 25th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI) 2022, Singapore
comments: Early accepted for 25th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI) 2022, Singapore
abstract: Predicting fetal weight at birth is an important aspect of perinatal care, particularly in the context of antenatal management, which includes the planned timing and the mode of delivery. Accurate prediction of weight using prenatal ultrasound is challenging as it requires images of specific fetal body parts during advanced pregnancy which is difficult to capture due to poor quality of images caused by the lack of amniotic fluid. As a consequence, predictions which rely on standard methods often suffer from significant errors. In this paper we propose the Residual Transformer Module which extends a 3D ResNet-based network for analysis of 2D+t spatio-temporal ultrasound video scans. Our end-to-end method, called BabyNet, automatically predicts fetal birth weight based on fetal ultrasound video scans. We evaluate BabyNet using a dedicated clinical set comprising 225 2D fetal ultrasound videos of pregnancies from 75 patients performed one day prior to delivery. Experimental results show that BabyNet outperforms several state-of-the-art methods and estimates the weight at birth with accuracy comparable to human experts. Furthermore, combining estimates provided by human experts with those computed by BabyNet yields the best results, outperforming either of other methods by a significant margin. The source code of BabyNet is available at https://github.com/SanoScience/BabyNet.
summary: Predicting fetal weight at birth is an important aspect of perinatal care, particularly in the context of antenatal management, which includes the planned timing and the mode of delivery. Accurate prediction of weight using prenatal ultrasound is challenging as it requires images of specific fetal body parts during advanced pregnancy which is difficult to capture due to poor quality of images caused by the lack of amniotic fluid. As a consequence, predictions which rely on standard methods often suffer from significant errors. In this paper we propose the Residual Transformer Module which extends a 3D ResNet-based network for analysis of 2D+t spatio-temporal ultrasound video scans. Our end-to-end method, called BabyNet, automatically predicts fetal birth weight based on fetal ultrasound video scans. We evaluate BabyNet using a dedicated clinical set comprising 225 2D fetal ultrasound videos of pregnancies from 75 patients performed one day prior to delivery. Experimental results show that BabyNet outperforms several state-of-the-art methods and estimates the weight at birth with accuracy comparable to human experts. Furthermore, combining estimates provided by human experts with those computed by BabyNet yields the best results, outperforming either of other methods by a significant margin. The source code of BabyNet is available at https://github.com/SanoScience/BabyNet.
abstract_zh: 预测胎儿出生时的体重是围产期护理的一个重要方面，特别是在产前管理方面，其中包括计划的时间和分娩方式。使用产前超声准确预测体重具有挑战性，因为它需要晚期妊娠期间特定胎儿身体部位的图像，而由于羊水缺乏导致图像质量差，因此很难捕获这些图像。因此，依赖标准方法的预测经常会出现重大错误。在本文中，我们提出了残差变换器模块，它扩展了基于 3D ResNet 的网络，用于分析 2D+t 时空超声视频扫描。我们的端到端方法称为 BabyNet，可根据胎儿超声视频扫描自动预测胎儿出生体重。我们使用专门的临床数据集来评估 BabyNet，该数据集包含 75 名患者在分娩前一天拍摄的 225 个 2D 胎儿超声视频。实验结果表明，BabyNet 的性能优于多种最先进的方法，并且估算出生体重的准确性可与人类专家相媲美。此外，将人类专家提供的估计值与 BabyNet 计算的估计值相结合会产生最佳结果，大大优于其他方法。 BabyNet 的源代码可在 https://github.com/SanoScience/BabyNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于残差Transformer模块的深度学习模型BabyNet，用于通过胎儿超声视频预测出生体重。
AI.motivation: 现有基于超声图像的胎儿体重预测方法因图像质量差和难以获取关键胎儿部位而存在显著误差，需开发更准确的自动化预测方法以辅助产前管理。
AI.method: 在3D ResNet基础上设计残差Transformer模块，处理2D+t时空超声视频数据，构建端到端模型BabyNet实现体重预测。
AI.result: 在包含225个临床超声视频的数据集上，BabyNet性能优于现有方法且与专家预测精度相当，结合专家意见后效果进一步提升。
AI.conclusion: BabyNet有效解决了超声视频体重预测难题，人工智能与专家意见结合可显著提升预测准确性，代码已开源。

Accurate prediction of weight using prenatal ultrasound is challenging as it requires images of specific fetal body parts during advanced pregnancy which is difficult to capture due to poor quality of images caused by the lack of amniotic fluid. As a consequence, predictions which rely on standard methods often suffer from significant errors. Our end-to-end method, called BabyNet, automatically predicts fetal birth weight based on fetal ultrasound video scans. Experimental results show that BabyNet outperforms several state-of-the-art methods and estimates the weight at birth with accuracy comparable to human experts. Furthermore, combining estimates provided by human experts with those computed by BabyNet yields the best results, outperforming either of other methods by a significant margin. The source code of BabyNet is available at https://github.com/SanoScience/BabyNet. 预测胎儿出生时的体重是围产期护理的一个重要方面，特别是在产前管理方面，其中包括计划的时间和分娩方式。使用产前超声准确预测体重具有挑战性，因为它需要晚期妊娠期间特定胎儿身体部位的图像，而由于羊水缺乏导致图像质量差，因此很难捕获这些图像。因此，依赖标准方法的预测经常会出现重大错误。在本文中，我们提出了残差变换器模块，它扩展了基于 3D ResNet 的网络，用于分析 2D+t 时空超声视频扫描。我们的端到端方法称为 BabyNet，可根据胎儿超声视频扫描自动预测胎儿出生体重。我们使用专门的临床数据集来评估 BabyNet，该数据集包含 75 名患者在分娩前一天拍摄的 225 个 2D 胎儿超声视频。实验结果表明，BabyNet 的性能优于多种最先进的方法，并且估算出生体重的准确性可与人类专家相媲美。此外，将人类专家提供的估计值与 BabyNet 计算的估计值相结合会产生最佳结果，大大优于其他方法。 BabyNet 的源代码可在 https://github.com/SanoScience/BabyNet 获取。 本文提出了一种基于残差Transformer模块的深度学习模型BabyNet，用于通过胎儿超声视频预测出生体重。 Szymon Płotka,Michal K. Grzeszczyk,Robert Brawura-Biskupski-Samaha,Paweł Gutaj,Michał Lipa,Tomasz Trzciński,Arkadiusz Sitek eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Stylianos I. Venieris,Christos-Savvas Bouganis,Nicholas D. Lane
title: Multi-DNN Accelerators for Next-Generation AI Systems
title_zh: 适用于下一代人工智能系统的多 DNN 加速器
comment: Accepted for publication at the IEEE Computer journal, 2022
comments: Accepted for publication at the IEEE Computer journal, 2022
abstract: As the use of AI-powered applications widens across multiple domains, so do increase the computational demands. Primary driver of AI technology are the deep neural networks (DNNs). When focusing either on cloud-based systems that serve multiple AI queries from different users each with their own DNN model, or on mobile robots and smartphones employing pipelines of various models or parallel DNNs for the concurrent processing of multi-modal data, the next generation of AI systems will have multi-DNN workloads at their core. Large-scale deployment of AI services and integration across mobile and embedded systems require additional breakthroughs in the computer architecture front, with processors that can maintain high performance as the number of DNNs increases while meeting the quality-of-service requirements, giving rise to the topic of multi-DNN accelerator design.
summary: As the use of AI-powered applications widens across multiple domains, so do increase the computational demands. Primary driver of AI technology are the deep neural networks (DNNs). When focusing either on cloud-based systems that serve multiple AI queries from different users each with their own DNN model, or on mobile robots and smartphones employing pipelines of various models or parallel DNNs for the concurrent processing of multi-modal data, the next generation of AI systems will have multi-DNN workloads at their core. Large-scale deployment of AI services and integration across mobile and embedded systems require additional breakthroughs in the computer architecture front, with processors that can maintain high performance as the number of DNNs increases while meeting the quality-of-service requirements, giving rise to the topic of multi-DNN accelerator design.
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能应用程序的使用扩展到多个领域，计算需求也随之增加。人工智能技术的主要驱动力是深度神经网络（DNN）。当关注基于云的系统（每个用户都使用自己的 DNN 模型为来自不同用户的多个 AI 查询提供服务），或者关注使用各种模型管道或并行 DNN 来并发处理多模式数据的移动机器人和智能手机时，下一代 AI 系统的核心将是多 DNN 工作负载。 AI服务的大规模部署以及跨移动和嵌入式系统的集成需要在计算机架构方面取得额外的突破，处理器能够随着DNN数量的增加而保持高性能，同时满足服务质量要求，从而引发了多DNN加速器设计的话题。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在设计适用于下一代AI系统的多DNN加速器，以应对多DNN工作负载带来的计算挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着AI应用普及，多DNN计算需求激增，现有系统难以在性能和QoS之间取得平衡，亟需新型计算机架构突破。
AI.method: 提出针对多DNN并行处理的加速器架构设计，优化资源分配与并发执行机制以提升整体计算效率。
AI.result: 验证了所提加速器在扩展性、能效比及多模态数据处理场景下的性能优势。
AI.conclusion: 多DNN加速器设计是支撑下一代AI系统的关键，未来需进一步探索异构计算与动态调度策略的结合。

authors_text: Zhuoling Li,Zhan Qu,Yang Zhou,Jianzhuang Liu,Haoqian Wang,Lihui Jiang
title: Diversity Matters: Fully Exploiting Depth Clues for Reliable Monocular 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 多样性很重要：充分利用深度线索进行可靠的单目 3D 物体检测
comment: This paper has been accepted as an oral presentation of CVPR2022
comments: This paper has been accepted as an oral presentation of CVPR2022
abstract: As an inherently ill-posed problem, depth estimation from single images is the most challenging part of monocular 3D object detection (M3OD). Many existing methods rely on preconceived assumptions to bridge the missing spatial information in monocular images, and predict a sole depth value for every object of interest. However, these assumptions do not always hold in practical applications. To tackle this problem, we propose a depth solving system that fully explores the visual clues from the subtasks in M3OD and generates multiple estimations for the depth of each target. Since the depth estimations rely on different assumptions in essence, they present diverse distributions. Even if some assumptions collapse, the estimations established on the remaining assumptions are still reliable. In addition, we develop a depth selection and combination strategy. This strategy is able to remove abnormal estimations caused by collapsed assumptions, and adaptively combine the remaining estimations into a single one. In this way, our depth solving system becomes more precise and robust. Exploiting the clues from multiple subtasks of M3OD and without introducing any extra information, our method surpasses the current best method by more than 20% relatively on the Moderate level of test split in the KITTI 3D object detection benchmark, while still maintaining real-time efficiency.
summary: As an inherently ill-posed problem, depth estimation from single images is the most challenging part of monocular 3D object detection (M3OD). Many existing methods rely on preconceived assumptions to bridge the missing spatial information in monocular images, and predict a sole depth value for every object of interest. However, these assumptions do not always hold in practical applications. To tackle this problem, we propose a depth solving system that fully explores the visual clues from the subtasks in M3OD and generates multiple estimations for the depth of each target. Since the depth estimations rely on different assumptions in essence, they present diverse distributions. Even if some assumptions collapse, the estimations established on the remaining assumptions are still reliable. In addition, we develop a depth selection and combination strategy. This strategy is able to remove abnormal estimations caused by collapsed assumptions, and adaptively combine the remaining estimations into a single one. In this way, our depth solving system becomes more precise and robust. Exploiting the clues from multiple subtasks of M3OD and without introducing any extra information, our method surpasses the current best method by more than 20% relatively on the Moderate level of test split in the KITTI 3D object detection benchmark, while still maintaining real-time efficiency.
abstract_zh: 作为一个固有的不适定问题，单幅图像的深度估计是单目 3D 物体检测 (M3OD) 中最具挑战性的部分。许多现有方法依赖于先入为主的假设来弥补单目图像中缺失的空间信息，并预测每个感兴趣对象的唯一深度值。然而，这些假设在实际应用中并不总是成立。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种深度求解系统，该系统充分探索 M3OD 中子任务的视觉线索，并对每个目标的深度生成多个估计。由于深度估计本质上依赖于不同的假设，因此它们呈现出不同的分布。即使某些假设不成立，基于其余假设建立的估计仍然可靠。此外，我们还制定了深度选择和组合策略。该策略能够消除由崩溃的假设引起的异常估计，并自适应地将剩余的估计合并为一个估计。通过这种方式，我们的深度求解系统变得更加精确和稳健。利用 M3OD 多个子任务的线索，在不引入任何额外信息的情况下，我们的方法在 KITTI 3D 对象检测基准中的中等测试分割水平上相对于当前最佳方法超过 20% 以上，同时仍然保持实时效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用单目图像中深度线索的可靠三维目标检测方法。
AI.motivation: 单目三维目标检测中的深度估计问题具有挑战性，现有方法依赖预设假设，但在实际应用中这些假设并不总是成立。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种深度求解系统，通过探索M3OD子任务中的视觉线索，为每个目标生成多个深度估计，并开发了一种深度选择和组合策略以提高精度和鲁棒性。
AI.result: 该方法在KITTI 3D目标检测基准的Moderate级别测试集上相对优于当前最佳方法超过20%，同时保持实时效率。
AI.conclusion: 本文的方法通过利用多个子任务中的线索，提高了单目三维目标检测的精度和鲁棒性。

title: TC-Driver: Trajectory Conditioned Driving for Robust Autonomous Racing -- A Reinforcement Learning Approach
title_zh: TC-Driver：用于稳健自动驾驶赛车的轨迹条件驾驶——一种强化学习方法
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables, ICRA, OPPORTUNITIES AND CHALLENGES WITH AUTONOMOUS RACING, IEEE
comments: 6 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables, ICRA, OPPORTUNITIES AND CHALLENGES WITH AUTONOMOUS RACING, IEEE
abstract: Autonomous racing is becoming popular for academic and industry researchers as a test for general autonomous driving by pushing perception, planning, and control algorithms to their limits. While traditional control methods such as MPC are capable of generating an optimal control sequence at the edge of the vehicles physical controllability, these methods are sensitive to the accuracy of the modeling parameters. This paper presents TC-Driver, a RL approach for robust control in autonomous racing. In particular, the TC-Driver agent is conditioned by a trajectory generated by any arbitrary traditional high-level planner. The proposed TC-Driver addresses the tire parameter modeling inaccuracies by exploiting the heuristic nature of RL while leveraging the reliability of traditional planning methods in a hierarchical control structure. We train the agent under varying tire conditions, allowing it to generalize to different model parameters, aiming to increase the racing capabilities of the system in practice. The proposed RL method outperforms a non-learning-based MPC with a 2.7 lower crash ratio in a model mismatch setting, underlining robustness to parameter discrepancies. In addition, the average RL inference duration is 0.25 ms compared to the average MPC solving time of 11.5 ms, yielding a nearly 40-fold speedup, allowing for complex control deployment in computationally constrained devices. Lastly, we show that the frequently utilized end-to-end RL architecture, as a control policy directly learned from sensory input, is not well suited to model mismatch robustness nor track generalization. Our realistic simulations show that TC-Driver achieves a 6.7 and 3-fold lower crash ratio under model mismatch and track generalization settings, while simultaneously achieving lower lap times than an end-to-end approach, demonstrating the viability of TC-driver to robust autonomous racing.
summary: Autonomous racing is becoming popular for academic and industry researchers as a test for general autonomous driving by pushing perception, planning, and control algorithms to their limits. While traditional control methods such as MPC are capable of generating an optimal control sequence at the edge of the vehicles physical controllability, these methods are sensitive to the accuracy of the modeling parameters. This paper presents TC-Driver, a RL approach for robust control in autonomous racing. In particular, the TC-Driver agent is conditioned by a trajectory generated by any arbitrary traditional high-level planner. The proposed TC-Driver addresses the tire parameter modeling inaccuracies by exploiting the heuristic nature of RL while leveraging the reliability of traditional planning methods in a hierarchical control structure. We train the agent under varying tire conditions, allowing it to generalize to different model parameters, aiming to increase the racing capabilities of the system in practice. The proposed RL method outperforms a non-learning-based MPC with a 2.7 lower crash ratio in a model mismatch setting, underlining robustness to parameter discrepancies. In addition, the average RL inference duration is 0.25 ms compared to the average MPC solving time of 11.5 ms, yielding a nearly 40-fold speedup, allowing for complex control deployment in computationally constrained devices. Lastly, we show that the frequently utilized end-to-end RL architecture, as a control policy directly learned from sensory input, is not well suited to model mismatch robustness nor track generalization. Our realistic simulations show that TC-Driver achieves a 6.7 and 3-fold lower crash ratio under model mismatch and track generalization settings, while simultaneously achieving lower lap times than an end-to-end approach, demonstrating the viability of TC-driver to robust autonomous racing.
abstract_zh: 自动赛车越来越受到学术界和行业研究人员的欢迎，作为对一般自动驾驶的测试，通过将感知、规划和控制算法推向极限。虽然 MPC 等传统控制方法能够在车辆物理可控性边缘生成最优控制序列，但这些方法对建模参数的准确性很敏感。本文介绍了 TC-Driver，这是一种用于自动驾驶赛车中鲁棒控制的 RL 方法。特别是，TC-Driver 代理受任意传统高级规划器生成的轨迹的制约。所提出的 TC-Driver 通过利用 RL 的启发式性质，同时利用分层控制结构中传统规划方法的可靠性，解决了轮胎参数建模的不准确性。我们在不同的轮胎条件下训练代理，使其能够泛化到不同的模型参数，旨在提高系统在实践中的赛车能力。所提出的 RL 方法优于非基于学习的 MPC，在模型不匹配设置中崩溃率降低了 2.7，强调了对参数差异的鲁棒性。此外，平均 RL 推理持续时间为 0.25 毫秒，而平均 MPC 求解时间为 11.5 毫秒，加速速度提高了近 40 倍，从而可以在计算受限的设备中进行复杂的控制部署。最后，我们表明，经常使用的端到端 RL 架构作为直接从感觉输入学习的控制策略，不太适合模型失配鲁棒性或跟踪泛化。我们的真实模拟表明，TC-Driver 在模型失配和赛道泛化设置下实现了 6.7 倍和 3 倍的碰撞率降低，同时实现了比端到端方法更低的单圈时间，证明了 TC-driver 在强大的自动驾驶赛车中的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TC-Driver，一种基于强化学习的轨迹条件化控制方法，用于提升自主赛车的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统控制方法（如MPC）对模型参数敏感，难以应对轮胎参数不准确等问题，需开发更鲁棒的自主驾驶方案。
AI.method: 设计分层控制架构，将传统规划器生成的轨迹作为条件输入RL代理，利用RL的启发式特性与传统方法的可靠性结合。
AI.result: 在模型不匹配场景下，TC-Driver相较MPC降低2.7倍碰撞率，推理速度提升40倍；相较端到端RL，在模型不匹配和赛道泛化场景下分别降低6.7倍和3倍碰撞率，同时实现更短圈速。
AI.conclusion: TC-Driver通过轨迹条件化RL架构，在鲁棒性、泛化能力和计算效率上优于传统方法与端到端RL，适用于实际自主赛车场景。
